anchor_create_table.Create Table:
CREATE TABLE `ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined_002` (
  `tenant_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL COMMENT '租户ID',
  `plate_type` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '板块大类',
  `group_manuf_line_name` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '产线分组',
  `manuf_line_name` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '产线名称',
  `attr1` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '规格',
  `data_date` varchar(20) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '日',
  `day_weight` decimal(40,4) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '日过钢量(吨)',
  `day_quantity` decimal(40,4) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '日数量',
  `day_average_thickness` decimal(40,4) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '日平均厚度',
  `day_lower_weight` decimal(40,4) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '日降级量(吨)',
  `day_lower_quantity` decimal(40,4) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '日降级量(数量)',
  `day_breakdown_frequency` bigint(20) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '日断带(次)',
  `day_planned_downtime` bigint(20) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '日正常停机(分钟)',
  `day_unplanned_downtime` bigint(20) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '日异常停机(分钟)',
  `day_manufacturing_finished_output_tons` decimal(40,4) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '日生产入库量(吨)',
  `day_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity` decimal(40,4) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '日生产入库量(数量)',
  `day_manufacturing_finished_output_length` decimal(40,4) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '日过钢量(米)',
  `day_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length` decimal(40,4) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '日不合格量(米)',
  `day_manufacturing_finished_product` decimal(40,4) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '日成品入库量(吨)',
  `day_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '日成品入库量(数量)',
  `month_weight` decimal(40,4) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '月过钢量(吨)',
  `month_quantity` decimal(40,4) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '月数量',
  `month_average_thickness` decimal(40,4) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '月平均厚度',
  `month_lower_weight` decimal(40,4) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '月降级量(吨)',
  `month_lower_quantity` decimal(40,4) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '月降级量(数量)',
  `month_breakdown_frequency` bigint(20) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '月断带(次)',
  `month_planned_downtime` bigint(20) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '月正常停机(分钟)',
  `month_unplanned_downtime` bigint(20) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '月异常停机(分钟)',
  `month_manufacturing_finished_output_tons` decimal(40,4) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '月生产入库量(吨)',
  `month_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity` decimal(40,4) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '月生产入库量(数量)',
  `month_manufacturing_finished_output_length` decimal(40,4) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '月过钢量(米)',
  `month_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length` decimal(40,4) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '月不合格量(米)',
  `month_manufacturing_finished_product` decimal(40,4) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '月成品入库量(吨)',
  `month_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity` decimal(40,4) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '月成品入库量(数量)',
  `month` varchar(20) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '月',
  `year` varchar(20) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '年',
  `rk` bigint(20) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '排序',
  `rk1` bigint(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  `remark` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '备注',
  `day_output_plan` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '日计划产量',
  KEY `idx_composite_1` (`tenant_id`,`data_date`,`manuf_line_name`),
  KEY `idx_day_average_thickness` (`day_average_thickness`),
  KEY `idx_day_breakdown_frequency` (`day_breakdown_frequency`),
  KEY `idx_day_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length` (`day_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length`),
  KEY `idx_day_lower_weight` (`day_lower_weight`),
  KEY `idx_day_manufacturing_finished_output_length` (`day_manufacturing_finished_output_length`),
  KEY `idx_day_manufacturing_finished_output_tons` (`day_manufacturing_finished_output_tons`),
  KEY `idx_day_planned_downtime` (`day_planned_downtime`),
  KEY `idx_day_quantity` (`day_quantity`),
  KEY `idx_day_unplanned_downtime` (`day_unplanned_downtime`),
  KEY `idx_day_weight` (`day_weight`),
  KEY `idx_plate_type` (`plate_type`),
  KEY `idx_tenant_id_data_date_manuf_line_name` (`tenant_id`,`data_date`,`manuf_line_name`),
  KEY `idx_tenant_id_plate_type` (`tenant_id`,`plate_type`,`data_date`,`manuf_line_name`),
  KEY `idx_xl13_tenant_date_line_attr1` (`tenant_id`,`data_date`,`manuf_line_name`,`attr1`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci

START TRANSACTION;
DELETE
FROM
    dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue;
INSERT INTO dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue (id, modified_time) SELECT DISTINCT
                                                                              a.id,
                                                                              NOW()
FROM
    ods_mes_mm_task_group_output a
        JOIN ods_mes_mm_task_prod_actual b ON b.actual_id = a.actual_id
WHERE
    b.r_modified_time >= (SELECT last_updated FROM dwd_update_tracker WHERE table_name = 'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output')
  AND b.r_modified_time <= NOW() UNION SELECT id, NOW() FROM ods_mes_mm_task_group_output WHERE r_modified_time >= (SELECT last_updated FROM dwd_update_tracker WHERE table_name = 'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output')
                                                                                            AND r_modified_time <= NOW();
UPDATE dwd_update_tracker
SET last_updated = NOW() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR
WHERE
    table_name = 'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output';

dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
DELETE
FROM
    ads_sc_xl_13_p1_003  where data_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 35 day
;
INSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_p1_003    SELECT
                                         a.tenant_id,
                                         a.plate_type,
                                         a.surface,
                                         a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1 attr1,
                                         a.steel_grade_series,
                                         a.defined_manuf_line_name group_manuf_line_name,
                                         a.defined_manuf_line_name manuf_line_name,
                                         a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_dataDate  data_date,
                                         sum( a.weight )/ 1000 weight,
                                         sum( a.quantity ) quantity,
                                         sum( CASE WHEN a.grade in ('A','R') or a.batch_code like '%-RD' or (a.tenant_id= '79' and a.defined_manuf_line_name in ('飞剪一组','平板一组')) or is_retention = 1 THEN 0   ELSE a.weight END )/ 1000 lower_weight,
                                         sum(CASE WHEN a.grade in ('A','R') or a.batch_code like '%-RD' or (a.tenant_id= '79' and a.defined_manuf_line_name in ('飞剪一组','平板一组') )or is_retention = 1 THEN 0   ELSE a.quantity END )/ 1000 lower_quantity,
                                         sum( a.roll_length ) manufacturing_finished_output_length,
                                         sum( CASE WHEN a.grade in ('A','R') or a.batch_code like '%-RD' or (a.tenant_id= '79' and a.defined_manuf_line_name in ('飞剪一组','平板一组')) or is_retention = 1 THEN 0   ELSE a.roll_length END ) lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,
                                         DATE_FORMAT( a.data_date, '%Y-%m' ) MONTH,
                                         YEAR ( a.data_date ) YEAR
FROM
    dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output a
WHERE a.plate_type is not null
  and  a.defined_manuf_line_name  is not null
  and a.batch_code is not null
  and a.batch_code <> '' and a.is_ignore=0
  AND tenant_id IN('80','92')
  AND a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_dataDate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 35 day


GROUP BY
    a.tenant_id,
    a.defined_manuf_line_name,
    a.surface,a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1  ,
    a.steel_grade_series,
    bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_dataDate ,
    a.plate_type
;

INSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_p1_003    SELECT
                                         a.tenant_id,
                                         a.plate_type,
                                         a.surface,a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1 ,
                                         a.steel_grade_series,
                                         a.defined_manuf_line_name group_manuf_line_name,
                                         a.defined_manuf_line_name manuf_line_name,
                                         bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_dataDate  data_date,
                                         sum( a.weight )/ 1000 weight,
                                         sum( a.quantity ) quantity,
                                         sum( CASE WHEN a.grade in ('A','R')  or a.batch_code like '%-RD' or (a.tenant_id= '79' and a.defined_manuf_line_name in ('飞剪一组','平板一组')) or is_retention = 1 THEN 0   ELSE a.weight END )/ 1000 lower_weight,
                                         sum(CASE WHEN a.grade in ('A','R') or a.batch_code like '%-RD' or (a.tenant_id= '79' and a.defined_manuf_line_name in ('飞剪一组','平板一组')) or is_retention = 1 THEN 0   ELSE a.quantity END )/ 1000 lower_quantity,
                                         sum( a.roll_length ) manufacturing_finished_output_length,
                                         sum( CASE WHEN a.grade in ('A','R') or a.batch_code like '%-RD'  or (a.tenant_id= '79' and a.defined_manuf_line_name in ('飞剪一组','平板一组')) or is_retention = 1 THEN 0   ELSE a.roll_length END ) lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,

dolphin_task_hits.name: ADS_SC_XL_13_003_02_ENRICH_DAY_METRICS
dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
DELETE
FROM
    ads_sc_xl_13_avg_thick_003
WHERE
    data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 35 DAY);
INSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_avg_thick_003  SELECT
                                                                         a.tenant_id,
                                                                         a.plate_type,
                                                                         a.defined_manuf_line_name manuf_line_name,
                                                                         a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1 attr1,
                                                                         CASE
                                                                             WHEN SUM(c.roll_length) = 0 THEN
                                                                                 0 ELSE SUM(c.act_height * c.roll_length) / SUM(c.roll_length)
                                                                             END average_thickness,
                                                                         a.data_date
FROM
    dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output a
        JOIN dwd_task_prod_actual c
             ON a.actual_id = c.actual_id
                 and  a.tenant_id = c.tenant_id
                 AND c.status = 1
                 AND a.data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 35 DAY)
WHERE
    a.data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 35 DAY)
  AND a.plate_type IS NOT NULL
  AND a.manuf_line_name IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
    a.tenant_id,
    a.plate_type,
    a.defined_manuf_line_name,
    a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1,
    a.data_date;

UPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_def_line_combined_003 AS target
    INNER JOIN ads_sc_xl_13_avg_thick_003 AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id
        AND target.plate_type = source.plate_type
        AND target.data_date = source.data_date
        AND target.manuf_line_name = source.manuf_line_name
        AND CASE WHEN target.attr1 IS NULL THEN 1 = 1 ELSE target.attr1 = source.attr1  END
SET target.day_average_thickness = source.average_thickness;

UPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_def_line_combined_003 AS target
SET target.day_manufacturing_finished_output_tons = 0,
    target.day_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity = 0;
DELETE
FROM
    ads_sc_xl_13_out_lz_003
WHERE
    data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 35 DAY);
INSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_out_lz_003 SELECT
                                                                             a.tenant_id,
                                                                             b.attribute1 AS manuf_line_name,
                                                                             a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1 attr1,
                                                                             SUM(CASE WHEN a.tenant_id = 80 AND a.wh_code = 'HNZZ6' AND a.rd_style = 0102 THEN 0 ELSE weight END) / 1000 AS manufacturing_finished_output_tons,
                                                                             SUM(CASE WHEN a.tenant_id = 80 AND a.wh_code = 'HNZZ6' AND a.rd_style = 0102 THEN 0 ELSE quantity END) AS manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,
                                                                             a.data_date,a.month
FROM
    ads_sc_xl_01 a
        JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id
        AND b.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-013-WH-CODE-DEFINED-LZ'
        AND (b.attribute2 = '*' OR a.wh_code = b.attribute2)
        AND (b.attribute5 = '*' OR a.dept_code = b.attribute5)
        AND (b.attribute3 = '*' OR a.steel_grade = b.attribute3)
        AND (b.attribute4 = '*' OR a.sku_code = b.attribute4)
        AND (b.attribute6 = '*' OR a.machine_code = b.attribute6)
WHERE
    a.bill_type = 2
  AND a.data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 35 DAY)
  AND a.rd_style <> '1101'
GROUP BY
    a.tenant_id,
    b.attribute1,
    a.data_date,
    a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1;
UPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_def_line_combined_003 AS target
    INNER JOIN ads_sc_xl_13_out_lz_003 AS source ON t

dolphin_task_hits.name: 更新月数据
dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
SET @start_month = DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 35 DAY, '%Y-%m');

TRUNCATE TABLE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined_process1;

INSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined_process1 (
    tenant_id,
    plate_type,
    manuf_line_name,
    attr1,
    `MONTH`,
    data_date,
    month_weight,
    month_quantity,
    month_average_thickness,
    month_lower_weight,
    month_lower_quantity,
    month_breakdown_frequency,
    month_planned_downtime,
    month_unplanned_downtime,
    month_manufacturing_finished_output_tons,
    month_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,
    month_manufacturing_finished_output_length,
    month_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,
    month_manufacturing_finished_product,
    month_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity
)
SELECT
    tenant_id,
    plate_type,
    manuf_line_name,
    attr1,
    month,
    data_date,
    SUM(COALESCE(day_weight, 0)) OVER w,
    SUM(COALESCE(day_quantity, 0)) OVER w,
    AVG(COALESCE(day_average_thickness, 0)) OVER w,
    SUM(COALESCE(day_lower_weight, 0)) OVER w,
    SUM(COALESCE(day_lower_quantity, 0)) OVER w,
    SUM(COALESCE(day_breakdown_frequency, 0)) OVER w,
    SUM(COALESCE(day_planned_downtime, 0)) OVER w,
    SUM(COALESCE(day_unplanned_downtime, 0)) OVER w,
    SUM(COALESCE(day_manufacturing_finished_output_tons, 0)) OVER w,
    SUM(COALESCE(day_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity, 0)) OVER w,
    SUM(COALESCE(day_manufacturing_finished_output_length, 0)) OVER w,
    SUM(COALESCE(day_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length, 0)) OVER w,
    SUM(COALESCE(day_manufacturing_finished_product, 0)) OVER w,
    SUM(COALESCE(CAST(NULLIF(day_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity, '') AS DECIMAL(40,4)), 0)) OVER w
FROM ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined
WHERE month >= @start_month
WINDOW w AS (
    PARTITION BY tenant_id, plate_type, manuf_line_name, attr1, month
    ORDER BY data_date
    ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
);

UPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined AS target
INNER JOIN ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined_process1 AS monthly
    ON target.tenant_id = monthly.tenant_id
    AND target.plate_type = monthly.plate_type
    AND target.manuf_line_name = monthly.manuf_line_name
    AND target.attr1 <=> monthly.attr1
    AND target.month = monthly.`MONTH`
    AND target.data_date = monthly.data_date
SET
    target.month_weight = monthly.month_weight,
    target.month_quantity = monthly.month_quantity,
    target.month_average_thickness = monthly.month_average_thickness,
    target.month_lower_weight = monthly.month_lower_weight,
    target.month_lower_quantity = monthly.month_lower_quantity,
    target.month_breakdown_frequency = monthly.month_breakdown_frequency,
    target.month_planned_downtime = monthly.month_planned_downtime,
    target.month_unplanned_downtime = monthly.month_unplanned_downtime,
    target.month_manufacturing_finished_output_tons = monthly.month_manufacturing_finished_output_tons,
    target.month_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity = monthly.month_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,
    target.month_manufacturing_finished_output_length = monthly.month_manufacturing_finished_output_length,
    target.month_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length = monthly.month_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,
    target.month_manufacturing_finished_product = monthly.month_manufacturing_finished_product,
    target.month_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity = monthly.month_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity
WHERE target.month >= @start_month;

ANALYZE TABLE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined_process1;

dolphin_task_hits.name: ads_gx_cg_07_detail(湖南涟钢原料采购)
dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
update ods_srm_scc_contract_material
set TEXTURE = SUBSTRING(
    line_remark,
    LOCATE(
        CONVERT(0xE69D90E8B4A8EFBC9A USING utf8mb4),
        REPLACE(
            line_remark,
            CONVERT(0xE69D90E8B4A83A USING utf8mb4),
            CONVERT(0xE69D90E8B4A8EFBC9A USING utf8mb4)
        )
    ) + CHAR_LENGTH(CONVERT(0xE69D90E8B4A8EFBC9A USING utf8mb4))
)
where line_remark like CONCAT('%', CONVERT(0xE69D90E8B4A83A USING utf8mb4), '%')
  and TEXTURE <> SUBSTRING(
    line_remark,
    LOCATE(
        CONVERT(0xE69D90E8B4A8EFBC9A USING utf8mb4),
        REPLACE(
            line_remark,
            CONVERT(0xE69D90E8B4A83A USING utf8mb4),
            CONVERT(0xE69D90E8B4A8EFBC9A USING utf8mb4)
        )
    ) + CHAR_LENGTH(CONVERT(0xE69D90E8B4A8EFBC9A USING utf8mb4))
);

update ods_srm_scc_contract_material
set TEXTURE = 'LGQX-HW'
where CONTRACT_MATERIAL_ID in (583712045574146, 583712045574147);

update ods_srm_scc_contract_material
set TEXTURE = 'LGW250HW-1'
where CONTRACT_MATERIAL_ID in (583015915624449, 583015523491842);

delete from ads_gx_cg_07_detail;

-- Step 1: detail rows
-- Split by texture only when the contract-side texture set exactly matches
-- the arrival-side vendor_steel_grade set for the same contract/spec/surface.
insert into ads_gx_cg_07_detail
select
    replace(b.vendor_contract_code, ' ', '') as vendor_contract_code,
    a.TEXTURE as TEXTURE,
    d.attribute2 as type,
    b.vendor_name as vendor_name,
    a.dimension as spec,
    a.surface as surface,
    sum(a.quantity_ton) as contract_quantity,
    coalesce(if(g.vendor_contract_code is not null, c1.quantity, c.quantity), 0) as quantity,
    sum(a.quantity_ton) - coalesce(if(g.vendor_contract_code is not null, c1.quantity, c.quantity), 0) as diff_quantity,
    coalesce(
        round(
            if(g.vendor_contract_code is not null, c1.quantity, c.quantity) / nullif(sum(a.quantity_ton), 0),

dolphin_task_hits.name: BI_GX_CG_003_DETAIL_BAK
dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
UPDATE dw_ods_prd.ods_srm_scc_contract_material 
SET line_remark = REPLACE(line_remark, ' ', '') 
WHERE line_remark LIKE '% %';
UPDATE  dw_ods_prd.ods_srm_scc_contract_head
set vendor_contract_code = REPLACE(vendor_contract_code, ' ', '') 
WHERE vendor_contract_code LIKE '% %';
DELETE FROM DW_ADS_PRD.BI_GX_CG_003_DETAIL_BAK;

-- 第1段 INSERT
INSERT INTO dw_ads_prd.BI_GX_CG_003_DETAIL_BAK 
SELECT

   b.vendor_contract_code,
    TEXTURE                                                  AS line_remark,
  case when a.STEEL_TYPE='QX' then '取向'  when a.STEEL_TYPE='WQX' and a.SURFACE <> 'W250' then ' 无取向'  when a.STEEL_TYPE='WQX' and a.SURFACE = 'W250' then '新能源'   end        AS type,
    b.vendor_name                                        AS vendor_name,
    a.dimension                                          AS spec,
    a.surface                                            AS surface,
    SUM(a.quantity_ton)                                  AS contract_quantity,
    COALESCE(c.quantity,0)                               AS quantity,
    SUM(a.quantity_ton) - COALESCE(c.quantity,0)         AS diff_quantity,
    COALESCE(ROUND(c.quantity / NULLIF(SUM(a.quantity_ton),0),2),0)             AS rate,
    CASE WHEN COALESCE(ROUND(c.quantity / NULLIF(SUM(a.quantity_ton),0),2),0) >= 0.95 
         THEN '是' ELSE '否' END                        AS is_completion,
    0                                      AS list_order,
    1                                                    AS rk,
    1                                                    AS rk1,
    CURRENT_DATE                                         AS data_date,
    NOW()                                                AS sync_time
FROM dw_ods_prd.ods_srm_scc_contract_material a
JOIN dw_ods_prd.ods_srm_scc_contract_head b 
  ON a.contract_head_id = b.contract_head_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
       replace(pa_item.pur_contract_code,' ','')  pur_contract_code,
        pa_item.spec,
        pa_item.surface,
        SUM(pa_item.quantity/1000) AS quantity
    FROM dw_ods_prd.ods_mes_hmes_pu_purchase_arrival   pa
    JOIN dw_ods_prd.ods_mes_hmes_pu_purchase_arrival_item pa_item
      ON pa.arrival_id = pa_item.arrival_id
     AND pa_item.status = 1
    WHERE pa.status = 1
      AND pa.tenant_id = 92
    GROUP BY pa_item.pur_contract_code, pa_item.spec, pa_item.surface
) c 
  ON b.vendor_contract_code = replace(c.pur_contract_code,' ','')
 AND a.dimension = c.spec
 AND a.surface = c.surface

WHERE b.contract_class = '14'
  AND b.contract_status IN ('archived','approved')
  AND a.dimension <> ''
 	and b.bu_code = '0070000'
	and b.vendor_contract_code <> '' 
	and b.vendor_contract_code is not null 
	and a.STEEL_TYPE   in ('QX','WQX')
	AND year(a.CREATION_DATE) >= 2025
	
  AND b.vendor_contract_code NOT IN (
      SELECT attribute1 
      FROM dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value 
      WHERE scene = 'BI-GX-CG-003-DETAIL-PC'
  )
GROUP BY 
    b.vendor_contract_code,
    TEXTURE,
    case when a.STEEL_TYPE='QX' then '取向'  when a.STEEL_TYPE='WQX' and a.SURFACE <> 'W250' then ' 无取向'  when a.STEEL_TYPE='WQX' and a.SURFACE = 'W250' then '新能源'   end,
    b.vendor_name,
    a.dimension,
    a.surface,
    c.quantity;

-- 第2段 INSERT（基于 created_by=''2307135'' 且 dimension=''） 
INSERT INTO dw_ads_prd.BI_GX_CG_003_DETAIL_BAK
SELECT
     sub.vendor_contract_code,
    sub.line_remark                               AS line_remark,
    sub.type                                      AS type,
    sub.vendor_name                               AS vendor_name,
    sub.spec                                      AS spec,
    sub.surface                                   AS surface,
    MAX(sub.contract_quantity)                    AS contract_quantity,
    SUM(sub.quantity)                             AS quantity,
    MAX(sub.contract_quantity) - SUM(sub.quantity) AS diff_quantity,
    COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(sub.quantity) / NULLIF(MAX(sub.contract_quantity),0),2),0) AS rate,
    sub.is_completion                             AS is_completion,

    SUM(CASE WHEN grade = 'D' THEN a.net_weight ELSE 0 END) AS d_net_weight,

    SUM(CASE WHEN grade = 'D' THEN a.lower_amount ELSE 0 END) AS d_lower_amount,

dolphin_task_hits.name: 冷轧版块质量指标明细表开发（ads_quality_machine_detail）
dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
START TRANSACTION;
UPDATE dwd_task_prod_actual
set lower_amount = 0 where lower_amount <> 0  ;

UPDATE dwd_task_prod_actual a
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT a1.attr_value             AS steel_grade,
                               c.attribute2              AS grade,
                               COALESCE(c.attribute3, 0) AS lower_amount
               FROM ods_mes_sys_attr_value a1
                        LEFT JOIN with_attr_value c
                                  ON a1.attr_value4 = c.ATTRIBUTE1
                                      AND c.scene = 'BI-SC-ZL-003-LOWER-AMOUNT'
               WHERE a1.attr_id = 1013
                 AND a1.status = 1) rule
    ON rule.steel_grade = a.steel_grade
        AND rule.grade = a.grade
    join (SELECT tenant_id, batch_code
          FROM (SELECT tenant_id, batch_code
                FROM ads_quality_machine_detail
                where inner_grade not in ('A1', 'A2')
                UNION ALL
                SELECT a.tenant_id, a.batch_code
                FROM dwd_task_prod_actual a
                         join ads_quality_machine_detail b on a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id
                    and a.in_batch_code = b.batch_code
                    AND b.disposal_method = '30'
                    AND b.inner_grade not in
                        ('A1', 'A2')) t) t on a.batch_code = t.batch_code and a.tenant_id = t.tenant_id
SET a.lower_amount =
        CASE
            WHEN  a.inner_grade  = 'A3' THEN
                a.net_weight / 1000 *
                CASE
                    WHEN a.disposal_method_name = '返修' THEN 80
                    WHEN a.disposal_method_name = '改装/改轧' THEN 300
                    ELSE 100
                    END
            ELSE
                CASE
                    WHEN rule.lower_amount IS NULL THEN NULL
                    ELSE a.net_weight / 1000 * rule.lower_amount
                    END
            END
;

                                        main_defect_machine,
                                        steel_grade,
                                        steel_grade_type,
                                        spec,
                                        surface,
                                        grade,
                                        inner_grade,
                                        main_defect_machine_name,
                                        split_in_weight,
                                        in_split_in_weight,
                                        net_weight,
                                        in_net_weight,
                                        sku_code,
                                        sku_name,
                                        quality,
                                        output_time,
                                        data_date,
                                        main_defect_code,
                                        lower_amount,
                                        producer,disposal_method,
                                        disposal_method_name)
select a.actual_id,
       a.batch_code,
       a.in_batch_code,
       a.original_batch_code,
       a.tenant_id,

dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
-- 清空目标表
DELETE FROM ads_sc_xl_16;

-- 插入数据，只处理计算相关的数字字段的NULL值
INSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_16
SELECT orc.id,
       orc.tenant_name,
       orc.machine_code,
       orc.order_item_code,
       orc.heat_no,
       orc.ferroboron_sku_code,
       COALESCE(orc.ferroboron, 0)/1000 AS ferroboron,
       orc.pure_iron_sku_code,
       COALESCE(orc.pure_iron, 0)/1000 AS pure_iron,
       orc.metallic_silicon_sku_code,
       COALESCE(orc.metallic_silicon, 0)/1000 AS metallic_silicon,
       orc.waste_code,
       COALESCE(orc.waste, 0)/1000 AS waste,
       0 AS previous_remaining_molten_steel,
       0 AS total_weight,
       COALESCE(out_Put.weight, 0)/1000 AS out_put_weight,
       out_Put.output_time,
       COALESCE(out_Put.output_act_width, 0) AS output_act_width,
       COALESCE(molten_steel.weight, 0)/1000 AS remaining_molten_steel,
       orc.molten_steel_bacth_code,
       orc.molten_steel,
       orc.created_by,
       orc.created_time,
       orc.modified_by,
       orc.modified_time,
       ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY orc.machine_code ORDER BY out_Put.output_time ASC) AS row_num
FROM dwd_mes_mm_order_raw_component orc
         LEFT JOIN (SELECT order_item_code,
                           SUM(COALESCE(weight, 0)) AS weight,
                           MIN(output_time) AS output_time,
                           MAX(COALESCE(act_width, 0)) AS output_act_width
                    FROM dwd_task_prod_actual
                    WHERE tenant_id = 92
                    GROUP BY order_item_code) out_Put ON orc.order_item_code = out_Put.order_item_code
         LEFT JOIN (SELECT order_item_code,
                           SUM(COALESCE(weight, 0)) AS weight
                    FROM dwd_mes_wms_wh_enter_item
                    WHERE sku_name = '钢水'
                      AND order_item_code IS NOT NULL
                    GROUP BY order_item_code) molten_steel ON orc.order_item_code = molten_steel.order_item_code
WHERE orc.output_generate_state = 1
ORDER BY orc.machine_code, row_num DESC;

-- 更新前一炉剩余钢水量
UPDATE ads_sc_xl_16 a
    JOIN ads_sc_xl_16 b ON a.machine_code = b.machine_code AND a.row_num - 1 = b.row_num
SET a.previous_remaining_molten_steel = COALESCE(b.remaining_molten_steel, 0);

-- 更新总重量
UPDATE ads_sc_xl_16
SET total_weight =
        COALESCE(ferroboron, 0) +
        COALESCE(pure_iron, 0) +
        COALESCE(metallic_silicon, 0) +
        COALESCE(waste, 0) +
        COALESCE(previous_remaining_molten_steel, 0);

/* =========================================================
   每小时执行脚本：刷新 current + 补字段 + 历史留档（日期+小时）
   ========================================================= */

START TRANSACTION;

/* =========================
   1) 刷新 current 表
   ========================= */

DELETE FROM dwd_mes_wms_current_stock;

INSERT INTO dwd_mes_wms_current_stock (
    stock_inst_id,
    top_cat_code,
    mid_cat_code,
    leaf_cat_code,
    sku_code,
    sku_name,
    wh_code,
    wh_name,
    wh_class,
    steel_grade,
    spec,
    surface,
    grade,
    batch_code,
    quantity,
    num,
    out_quantity,
    out_num,
    in_quantity,
    in_num,
    trans_in_quantity,
    trans_in_num,
    trans_out_quantity,
    trans_out_num,
    plan_quantity,
    plan_num,
    disable_quantity,
    disable_num,
    ava_quantity,
    ava_num,
    m_date,
    exp_date,
    `status`,
    created_by,
    created_time,
    modified_by,
    modified_time,
    tenant_id,
    tenant_name,
    lock_quantity,
    lock_num,
    log_id,
    stock_status,
    unique_code,
    last_enter_date,
    weight,
    producer,
    act_height,
    act_width,
    tax_amount,
    amount,
    make_order_num,
    next_machine_code,
    project_number,
    sync_time,
    data_date,
    days,
    r_modified_time,
    iron_loss
)
WITH invalid_parent_batches AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT parent_batch_code
    FROM ods_mes_wms_batch_info
    WHERE `status` = 1
      AND parent_batch_code IS NOT NULL
      AND batch_code <> parent_batch_code
)
SELECT
    cs.stock_inst_id,
    SUBSTRING(cs.sku_code, 1, 2) AS top_cat_code,
    SUBSTRING(cs.sku_code, 1, 4) AS mid_cat_code,
    SUBSTRING(cs.sku_code, 1, 6) AS leaf_cat_code,
    cs.sku_code,
    ods_sku.sku_name,
    cs.wh_code,
    ww.wh_name,
    ww.wh_class,
    cs.steel_grade,
    cs.spec,
    cs.surface,
    cs.grade,
    cs.batch_code,
    cs.quantity,
    cs.num,
    cs.out_quantity,
    cs.out_num,
    cs.in_quantity,
    cs.in_num,
    cs.trans_in_quantity,
    cs.trans_in_num,
    cs.trans_out_quantity,
    cs.trans_out_num,
    cs.plan_quantity,
    cs.plan_num,
    cs.disable_quantity,
    cs.disable_num,
    cs.ava_quantity,
    cs.ava_num,
    cs.m_date,
    cs.exp_date,
    cs.`status`,
    cs.created_by,
    cs.created_time,
    cs.modified_by,
    cs.modified_time,
    cs.tenant_id,
    mt.tenant_name,
    cs.lock_quantity,
    cs.lock_num,
    cs.log_id,
    cs.stock_status,
    cs.unique_code,
    cs.last_enter_date,
    cs.ava_quantity weight,
    bi.producer,
    bi.act_height,
    bi.act_width,
    bi.tax_amount,
    bi.amount,
    bi.make_order_num,
    bi.next_machine_code,
    bi.project_number,
    NOW() AS sync_time,
    CASE
        WHEN HOUR(cs.last_enter_date) >= 8 THEN DATE(cs.last_enter_date)
        ELSE DATE(DATE_SUB(cs.last_enter_date, INTERVAL 1 DAY))
        END AS data_date,
    DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE(), DATE(cs.last_enter_date)) AS days,
    cs.r_modified_time,
    bi.iron_loss
FROM ods_mes_wms_current_stock cs
         JOIN ods_mes_wms_warehouse ww
              ON cs.wh_code = ww.wh_code
                  AND cs.tenant_id = ww.tenant_id
                  AND ww.`status` = '1'
         JOIN ods_mes_pm_sku ods_sku
              ON cs.sku_code = ods_sku.sku_code
                  AND ods_sku.`status` = '1'
         JOIN ods_mes_wms_batch_info bi
              ON cs.batch_code = bi.batch_code
                  AND cs.sku_code = bi.sku_code
                  AND cs.steel_grade = bi.steel_grade
                  AND cs.surface = bi.surface
                  AND cs.grade = bi.grade
                  AND cs.spec = bi.spec
                  AND cs.tenant_id = bi.tenant_id
                  AND bi.`status` = 1
         JOIN ods_mes_mdm_tenant mt
              ON cs.tenant_id = mt.tenant_id
                  AND mt.`status` = '1'
         LEFT JOIN invalid_parent_batches ipb
                   ON cs.batch_code = ipb.parent_batch_code
WHERE cs.quantity > 0
  AND cs.ava_quantity > 0
  AND cs.`status` = 1
#   AND cs.te

dolphin_task_hits.name: 报表-生产-质量-肇庆-部门吨钢损失-冷轧2B产品质量指标（ads_sc_zl_15_machine_department_loss）
dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
-- 日度
-- 肇庆自工序降B/CD/S损失吨钢
-- 删除原有对应指标的数据
DELETE FROM ads_sc_zl_15_machine_department_loss
WHERE index_no IN ('index_01', 'index_02', 'index_06');

-- 插入新数据（返修来自新表，并过滤主缺陷机台）
INSERT INTO ads_sc_zl_15_machine_department_loss (
    tenant_id,
    data_date,
    data_month,
    machine_code,
    machine_name,
    direct_loss,
    rework_loss,
    molecule,
    denominator,
    period,
    index_no,
    index_name
)
WITH
-- 直接损失及分母（原逻辑，去掉返修部分）
direct_loss_data AS (
    SELECT
        a.tenant_id,
        a.data_date,
        a.machine_code,
        a.machine_name,
        -- B直接降级损失
        SUM(CASE
                WHEN a.inner_grade = 'B' AND a.main_defect_machine IN ('5TCM1', 'CAPL1')
                    THEN a.lower_amount ELSE 0
            END) AS direct_b,
        -- CD直接降级损失
        SUM(CASE
                WHEN a.inner_grade IN ('C', 'D') AND a.main_defect_machine IN ('5TCM1', 'CAPL1')
                    THEN a.lower_amount ELSE 0
            END) AS direct_cd,
        -- S直接降级损失
        SUM(CASE
                WHEN a.inner_grade = 'S' AND a.main_defect_machine IN ('5TCM1', 'CAPL1')
                    THEN a.lower_amount ELSE 0
            END) AS direct_s,
        -- 分母（产量吨数）
        SUM(split_in_weight)/1000 AS denominator
    FROM ads_quality_machine_detail a
    WHERE a.machine_name = '冷酸机台'
      AND a.quality NOT LIKE '%开胚%' AND a.quality NOT LIKE '%开坯%'
      AND a.batch_code NOT LIKE '%RD%'
      AND a.tenant_id = 5
      AND a.batch_code <> ''
    GROUP BY a.tenant_id, a.data_date, a.machine_code, a.machine_name
),
-- 返修损失（从新返修表汇总到机台级别，并过滤主缺陷机台）
rework_loss_data AS (
    SELECT
        tenant_id,
        data_date,
        machine_name,
        SUM(b_lower_amount) AS rework_b,
        SUM(c_lower_amount + d_lower_amount) AS rework_cd,
        SUM(s_lower_amount) AS rework_s
    FROM ads_quality_rework_summary
    WHERE tenant_id = 5
      AND machine_name = '冷酸机台'
      AND main_defect_machine_name IN ('五连轧机台', '冷酸机台')   -- 新增过滤条件
    GROUP BY tenant_id, data_date, machine_name
)
-- 最终结果：B等级
SELECT
    d.tenant_id,
    d.data_date,
    DATE_FORMAT(d.data_date, '%Y-%m') AS data_month,
    d.machine_code,
    d.machine_name,
    d.direct_b AS direct_loss,
    COALESCE(r.rework_b, 0) AS rework_loss,
    d.direct_b + COALESCE(r.rework_b, 0) AS molecule,
    d.denominator,
    'D' AS period,
    'index_01' AS index_no,
    '日自工序降B损失吨钢' AS index_name
FROM direct_loss_data d
         LEFT JOIN rework_loss_data r
                   ON d.tenant_id = r.tenant_id
                       AND d.data_date = r.data_date
                       AND d.machine_name = r.machine_name

UNION ALL

-- CD等级
SELECT
    d.tenant_id,
    d.data_date,
    DATE_FORMAT(d.data_date, '%Y-%m') AS data_month,
    d.machine_code,
    d.machine_name,
    d.direct_cd AS direct_loss,
    COALESCE(r.rework_cd, 0) AS rework_loss,
    d.direct_cd + COALESCE(r.rework_cd, 0) AS molecule,
    d.denominator,
    'D' AS period,
    'index_02' AS index_no,
    '日自工序降CD损失吨钢' AS index_name
FROM direct_loss_data d
         LEFT JOIN rework_loss_data r
                   ON d.tenant_id = r.tenant_id
                       AND d.data_date = r.data_date
                       AND d.machine_name = r.machine_name

UNION ALL

-- S等级
SELECT
    d.tenant_id,
    d.data_date,
    DATE_FORMAT(d.data_date, '%Y-%m') AS data_month,
    d.machine_code,
    d.machine_name,
    d.direct_s AS direct_loss,
    COALESCE(r.rework_s, 0) AS rework_loss,
    d.direct_s + COALESCE(r.rework_s, 0) AS molecule,
    d.denominator,
    'D' AS period,
    'index_06' AS index_no,
    '日自工序降S损失吨钢' AS index_name
FROM direct_loss_data d
         LEFT JOIN rework_loss_data r
                   ON d.tenant_id = r.tenant_id
                       AND d.data_date = r.data_date
                       AND d.machine_name = r.machine_name
ORDER BY data_date DESC;


#日度
#肇庆自工序降R损失吨钢
delete
from ads_sc_zl_15_machine_department_loss  where index_no = 'index_03' ;

dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
START TRANSACTION;
DELETE
FROM with_attr_value
WHERE scene = 'BI_GX_XS_006_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL';
INSERT INTO with_attr_value (tenant_id, scene, ATTRIBUTE1, ATTRIBUTE2, ATTRIBUTE3, ATTRIBUTE4, ATTRIBUTE5, ATTRIBUTE6,
                             ATTRIBUTE7, ATTRIBUTE8, ATTRIBUTE9)
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT sc.tenant_id,
             'BI_GX_XS_006_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL' scene,
             sc.contract_code,
             scd.prod_spec2                    surface,
             a.surface_thickness,
             a.surface_number,
             sc.contract_month,
             round(SUM(CASE
                           WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.weight / 1000
                           WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.weight
                           ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  total_contract_weight,
             round(SUM(CASE
                           WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_allocated / 1000
                           WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_allocated
                           ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  quantity_dj,
             round(SUM(CASE
                           WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped / 1000
                           WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped
                           ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  quantity_sy,
             a.attr1
      FROM ods_crm_sa_contract sc
               JOIN ods_crm_sa_contract_detail scd ON sc.contract_code = scd.contract_code
          AND scd.contract_detail_state IN (30, 50)
          AND scd.STATUS = 1 and scd.quantity_unshipped > 0
          AND scd.prod_spec4 = 'A'
               JOIN dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info a
                    ON scd.prod_spec2 = a.surface and a.silicon_steel_product_category_code = 'QX'
      WHERE sc.contract_state IN (30, 50)
        AND sc.contract_type <> '40'
        AND substr(sc.contract_month, 1, 4) >= 2025
        AND sc.STATUS = 1

      GROUP BY sc.tenant_id,
               sc.contract_code,

DELETE FROM ads_sc_zl_16_surface_defect;

    end_meter,

    width,

    defect_type,
    surface_side,
    severity_level,
    responsibility_machine,
    defect_desc,
    batch_idx,
    defect_idx,
    severity_rank
)
WITH RECURSIVE
    seq AS (
        SELECT 0 AS n
        UNION ALL
        SELECT n + 1 FROM seq WHERE n < 50
    ),

/* ① qc → actualId */
    qc_hit AS (
        SELECT
            qc.qc_id,
            qc.qc_content,
            qc.r_modified_time,
            CAST(
                    NULLIF(
                            JSON_UNQUOTE(
                                    JSON_EXTRACT(qc.qc_content,'$.batchQcDataList[0].actualId')
                            ),
                            ''
                    ) AS UNSIGNED
            ) AS actual_id

        FROM ods_mes_mm_task_qc qc
        WHERE qc.status = 1
    ),

/* ② 直接命中生产实绩 */
    prod AS (
        SELECT
            q.qc_id,
            q.qc_content,
            q.r_modified_time,
            a.batch_code
        FROM qc_hit q
                 JOIN dwd_task_prod_actual a
                      ON a.actual_id = q.actual_id
                          AND a.status = 1
                          AND a.tenant_id = 92
                          AND a.data_date >= '2026-01-01'
                          AND (
                             SUBSTRING_INDEX(a.machine_code,'#',-1) IN ('DCL','BAF','FCL')
                                 OR LEFT(a.machine_code,3) IN ('DCL','BAF','FCL')
                             )
    ),

/* ③ 展开 batchQcDataList */
    batch_idx_cte AS (
        SELECT
            p.qc_id,
            p.batch_code,
            p.qc_content,
            s.n AS bi,
            p.r_modified_time
        FROM prod p
                 JOIN seq s
                      ON s.n < IFNULL(JSON_LENGTH(p.qc_content,'$.batchQcDataList'),0)
    ),

/* ④ 展开 surfaceDefect */
    defect_idx_cte AS (
        SELECT
            b.qc_id,
            b.batch_code,
            b.qc_content,
            b.bi,
            s.n AS di,
            b.r_modified_time
        FROM batch_idx_cte b
                 JOIN seq s
                      ON s.n < IFNULL(
                              JSON_LENGTH(
                                      b.qc_content,
                                      CONCAT('$.batchQcDataList[',b.bi,'].surfaceDefect')
                              ),
                              0
                               )
    )

SELECT
    d.qc_id                                      AS qc_id,
    d.batch_code                                AS batch_code,
    LEFT(d.batch_code,10)                       AS original_batch_code,

    JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(d.qc_content,
                              CONCAT('$.batchQcDataList[',d.bi,'].surfaceDefect[',d.di,'].grade')
                 )) AS grade,

    JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(d.qc_content,
                              CONCAT('$.batchQcDataList[',d.bi,'].surfaceDefect[',d.di,'].checkType')
                 )) AS defect_check_type,

    JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(d.qc_content,
                              CONCAT('$.batchQcDataList[',d.bi,'].surfaceDefect[',d.di,'].startMeter')
                 )) AS start_meter,

    JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(d.qc_content,
                              CONCAT('$.batchQcDataList[',d.bi,'].surfaceDefect[',d.di,'].endMeter')
                 )) AS end_meter,

    JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(d.qc_content,
                              CONCAT('$.batchQcDataList[',d.bi,'].surfaceDefect[',d.di,'].length')
                 )) AS defect_length,
    JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(d.qc_content,
                              CONCAT('$.batchQcDataList[',d.bi,'].surfaceDefect[',d.di,'].width')
                 )) AS width,
    JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(d.qc_content,
                              CONCAT('$.batchQcDataLi

START TRANSACTION;

INSERT INTO with_attr_value (tenant_id, scene, ATTRIBUTE1, ATTRIBUTE2, ATTRIBUTE3, ATTRIBUTE4, ATTRIBUTE5, ATTRIBUTE6,
                             ATTRIBUTE7, ATTRIBUTE8, ATTRIBUTE9)
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT sc.tenant_id,
             'BI_GX_XS_006_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL' scene,
             sc.contract_code,
             scd.prod_spec2                    surface,
             a.surface_thickness,
             a.surface_number,
             sc.contract_month,
             round(SUM(CASE
                           WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.weight / 1000
                           WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.weight
                           ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  total_contract_weight,
             round(SUM(CASE
                           WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_allocated / 1000
                           WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_allocated
                           ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  quantity_dj,
             round(SUM(CASE
                           WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped / 1000
                           WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped
                           ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  quantity_sy,
            a.attr1
      FROM ods_crm_sa_contract sc
               JOIN ods_crm_sa_contract_detail scd ON sc.contract_code = scd.contract_code
          AND scd.contract_detail_state IN (30, 50)
          AND scd.STATUS = 1 and scd.quantity_unshipped > 0
          AND scd.prod_spec4 = 'A'
               JOIN dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info a

      WHERE sc.contract_state IN (30, 50)
        AND sc.contract_type <> '40'
        AND substr(sc.contract_month, 1, 4) >= 2025
        AND sc.STATUS = 1

      GROUP BY sc.tenant_id,
               sc.contract_code,
               scd.prod_spec2,
               a.surface_thickness,

               a.attr1) a

dolphin_task_hits.name: 铁心年度发货情况表（ads_gx_xs_18_08）
dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
DELETE
FROM with_attr_value
WHERE scene = 'ads_gx_xs_18_08_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL';
INSERT INTO with_attr_value (tenant_id, scene, ATTRIBUTE1, ATTRIBUTE2, ATTRIBUTE5, ATTRIBUTE6, ATTRIBUTE7,
                             ATTRIBUTE8,
                             ATTRIBUTE9)
SELECT sc.tenant_id,
       'ads_gx_xs_18_08_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL' scene,
       sc.contract_code,
       sc.cust_abbr,
       sc.contract_month,
       round(SUM(CASE
                     WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.weight / 1000
                     WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.weight
                     ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  total_contract_weight,
       round(SUM(CASE
                     WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_allocated / 1000
                     WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_allocated
                     ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  quantity_dj,
       round(SUM(CASE
                     WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped / 1000
                     WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped
                     ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  quantity_sy,
       sc.is_signed_by_both
FROM ods_crm_sa_contract sc
         JOIN ods_crm_sa_contract_detail scd ON sc.contract_code = scd.contract_code
    AND scd.contract_detail_state in (30, 50) AND scd.STATUS = 1  and scd.quantity_unshipped > 0 and scd.pricing_type in (20,30)
WHERE sc.contract_state in (30, 50)
  AND sc.contract_type <> '40'
  AND substr(sc.contract_month, 1, 4) >= 2024
  AND sc.STATUS = 1
  and  scd.sku_code in (select sku_code
                        from ods_mes_pm_sku sku
                                 join with_attr_value av1 ON sku.sku_name = av1.attribute1
                            AND av1.scene = 'bi_gx_xs_017_STOCK_NAME'  and av1.tenant_id  = 92
                        where   sku.status = 1  )
GROUP BY sc.tenant_id,
         sc.contract_code,
         sc.cust_abbr,
         sc.contract_month
;
INSERT INTO with_attr_value (tenant_id, scene, ATTRIBUTE1, ATTRIBUTE2, ATTRIBUTE5, ATTRIBUTE6, ATTRIBUTE7,

       round(SUM(CASE
                     WHEN sec_unit_code = '002' THEN scd.weight / 1000

                     WHEN sec_unit_code = '002' THEN scd.sec_quantity_allocated / 1000
                     WHEN sec_unit_code = '003' THEN scd.sec_quantity_allocated

       round(SUM(CASE
                     WHEN sec_unit_code = '002' THEN scd.sec_quantity_unshipped / 1000
                     WHEN sec_unit_code = '003' THEN scd.sec_quantity_unshipped
                     ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  quantity_sy,
       sc.is_signed_by_both
FROM ods_crm_sa_contract sc
         JOIN ods_crm_sa_contract_detail scd ON sc.contract_code = scd.contract_code
    AND scd.contract_detail_state in (30, 50) AND scd.STATUS = 1  and scd.quantity_unshipped > 0 and scd.pricing_type = 10
WHERE sc.contract_state in (30, 50)

dolphin_task_hits.name: 肇庆_废损率（ads_sc_zl_14）
dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
START TRANSACTION;

DELETE FROM ads_sc_zl_14_process1
WHERE tenant_id = 5;

INSERT INTO ads_sc_zl_14_process1
WITH a AS (
    SELECT
        tenant_id,
        batch_code,
        parent_batch_code,
        original_batch_code,
        MAX(checked_time) AS a_checked_time
    FROM dwd_mes_wms_wh_enter_item
    WHERE  tenant_id = 5
      AND verify_status = 2
      and wh_name IN (
                         '五连轧半成品仓',
                         '冷酸半成品仓',
                         '平整半成品仓',
                         '二十辊并卷半成品仓',
                         '退火半成品仓',
                         '二十辊轧机半成品仓',
                         '光亮炉半成品仓',
                         '卷材半成品仓（自有）',
                         '光亮炉成品仓（一）',
                         '卷材成品仓（一）',
                         '卷材成品仓（二）'
        )

      AND original_batch_code IS NOT NULL AND original_batch_code <> ''
      AND batch_code IS NOT NULL AND batch_code <> ''
    GROUP BY tenant_id, batch_code, parent_batch_code, original_batch_code
),
     b AS (
         SELECT
             tenant_id,
             batch_code,
             original_batch_code,
             MAX(checked_time) AS b_checked_time
         FROM dwd_mes_wms_wh_enter_item
         WHERE wh_name IN ('精加工原料仓（一）', '精加工原料仓（二）')
           AND rd_style_name = '调拨入库'
           AND tenant_id = 5
           AND verify_status = 2
           AND original_batch_code IS NOT NULL AND original_batch_code <> ''
           AND batch_code IS NOT NULL AND batch_code <> ''
         GROUP BY tenant_id, batch_code, original_batch_code
     ),
     c AS (
         SELECT
             tenant_id,
             original_batch_code,
             MAX(checked_time) AS c_checked_time
         FROM dwd_mes_wms_wh_enter_item
         WHERE wh_name IN ('精加工卷材成品仓', '精加工板材成品仓')
           AND tenant_id = 5
           AND verify_status = 2
           AND original_batch_code IS NOT NULL AND original_batch_code <> ''
         GROUP BY tenant_id, original_batch_code
     )
SELECT
    a.tenant_id,
    a.original_batch_code,
    a.parent_batch_code,
    a.batch_code,
    a.a_checked_time,
    b.b_checked_time,
    c.c_checked_time
FROM a
         LEFT JOIN b
                   ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id
                       AND a.batch_code = b.batch_code
                       AND a.original_batch_code = b.original_batch_code
         LEFT JOIN c
                   ON a.tenant_id = c.tenant_id
                       AND a.original_batch_code = c.original_batch_code;

COMMIT;

    tenant_id,

WITH

),
jg_originals AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT tenant_id, original_batch_code

),
-- 没去过精加工：按叶子卷（避免父子重复）
leaf_batches AS (
    SELECT
        p.tenant_id,
        p.original_batch_code,
        p.batch_code
    FROM ads_sc_zl_14_process1 p
             LEFT JOIN ads_sc_zl_14_process1 ch
                       ON ch.tenant_id = p.tenant_id
                           AND ch.original_batch_code = p.original_batch_code
                           AND ch.parent_batch_code = p.batch_code
             LEFT JOIN jg_originals jo
                       ON jo.tenant_id = p.tenant_id
                           AND jo.original_batch_code = p.original_batch_code
    WHERE p.tenant_id = 5
      AND jo.original_batch_code IS NULL      -- 没去过精加工
      AND ch.parent_batch_code IS NULL        -- 叶子卷
      AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM dwd_mes_wms_wh_enter_item ei
        WHERE ei.tenant_id = 5
          AND ei.verify_status = 2
          AND ei.wh_name IN ('光亮炉成品仓(一)','光亮炉成品仓(二)',

   队列表：dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2（不变）
   批大小：500（写死，避免 LIMIT @var 报错）
   ========================================================= */

START TRANSACTION;

SET @batch_id := REPLACE(UUID(), '-', '');
SET @lock_expire_min := 30;

-- 1) 消费日志：RUNNING
INSERT INTO dwd_task_execution_log (
    task_name,
    target_table,
    batch_id,
    water_from,
    water_to,
    start_time,
    status
) VALUES (
             'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output',
             'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_2',
             @batch_id,
             '2000-01-01 00:00:00',
             '2000-01-01 00:00:00',
             NOW(),
             0
         );

-- 2) 回收锁超时（可选）
UPDATE dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2
SET status = 0,
    batch_id = NULL,
    locked_time = NULL
WHERE table_name = 'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output'
  AND status = 1
  AND locked_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL @lock_expire_min MINUTE);

-- 3) 锁一批 NEW（500）
UPDATE dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2 q
SET q.status      = 1,
    q.batch_id    = @batch_id,
    q.locked_time = NOW(),
    q.attempts    = q.attempts + 1
WHERE q.table_name = 'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output'
  AND q.status = 0
ORDER BY q.updated_time
LIMIT 500000;

-- 4) picked_count
UPDATE dwd_task_execution_log
SET picked_count = (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2
    WHERE table_name='dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output'
      AND status=1
      AND batch_id=@batch_id
)
WHERE task_name='dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output'
  AND batch_id=@batch_id;

-- 5) 主表 UPSERT（写入 dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_2，仅本批）
INSERT INTO dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_2(
    id,
    sku_code,
    sku_name,
    batch_code,
    actual_id,
    steel_grade,
    spec,
    surface,
    grade,
    inner_grade,
    weight,
    quantity,
    roll_length,
    group_id,
    group_name,
    group_leader,
    cat_name,
    steel_grade_series,
    date_time,
    start_time,
    end_time,
    data_date,
    MONTH,
    YEAR,
    tenant_id,
    rate,
    rate_unit,
    rate_type,
    theory_use_time,
    actual_use_time,
    send_happened,
    is_ignore,
    manuf_line_code,
    manuf_line_name,
    sku_type,
    r_modified_time,
    r_modified_date,
    is_retention,
    is_baf,
    proce_note,
    flaw_describe,
    split_in_weight,
    yield_rate,
    next_machine_code,
    next_sku_code
)
SELECT
    a.id,
    b.sku_code,
    sku.sku_name,
    b.batch_code,
    b.actual_id,
    b.steel_grade,
    b.spec,
    b.surface,
    b.grade,
    b.inner_grade,
    a.weight,
    a.quantity,
    a.meter_num AS roll_length,
    a.group_id,
    a.group_code AS group_name,
    mg.group_leader AS group_leader,

    IFNULL((
               SELECT d.cat_name
               FROM ods_mes_pm_stat_cat_sku c
                        JOIN ods_mes_pm_stat_cat d ON c.top_cat_code = d.cat_code
               WHERE c.sku_code = b.sku_code
                 AND (c.steel_grade = b.steel_grade OR c.steel_grade = '*')
                 AND (c.surface = b.surface OR c.surface = '*')
               LIMIT 1
           ), '其它') AS cat_name,

    (SELECT attr_value4
     FROM ods_mes_sys_attr_value
     WHERE attr_id = 1013 AND status = 1 AND attr_value = b.steel_grade
     LIMIT 1) AS steel_grade_series,

    a.end_time AS date_time,
    a.start_time,
    a.end_time,

    CASE
        WHEN a.tenant_id = 80 AND HOUR(a.end_time) < 9 THEN DATE(a.end_time) - INTERVAL 1 DAY
        WHEN a.tenant_id <> 80 AND HOUR(a.end_time) < 8 THEN DATE(a.end_time) - INTERVAL 1 DAY
        ELSE DATE(a.end_time)
        END AS data_date,

    DATE_FORMAT(a.end_time, '%Y-%m') AS MONTH,
    DATE_FORMAT(a.end_time, '%Y')   AS YEAR,

    b.tenant_id,

    a.rate,

dolphin_task_hits.name: 班组产能水位表（dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2）
dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
START TRANSACTION;

-- 0) 固定本次窗口
SET @to_ts := CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;

-- 1) 确保 tracker_v2 有该任务行（避免 SELECT FOR UPDATE 查不到）
INSERT INTO dwd_update_tracker_v2(table_name, last_enqueued, last_updated)
VALUES ('dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output', '2000-01-01 00:00:00', '2000-01-01 00:00:00')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE table_name = VALUES(table_name);

-- 2) 锁住入队水位（避免并发入队造成窗口错乱）
SET @from_ts := (
    SELECT last_enqueued
    FROM dwd_update_tracker_v2
    WHERE table_name = 'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output'
        FOR UPDATE
);

-- 3) 生成本次入队日志ID（用 to_ts 固定，便于追溯）
SET @enqueue_log_id := CONCAT('ENQ_', DATE_FORMAT(@to_ts, '%Y%m%d%H%i%S'));

-- 4) 写入日志：RUNNING
INSERT INTO dwd_task_execution_log (
    task_name,
    target_table,
    batch_id,
    water_from,
    water_to,
    start_time,
    status
) VALUES (
             'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output',
             'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output',
             @enqueue_log_id,
             @from_ts,
             @to_ts,
             NOW(),
             0
         );

-- 5) 入队①：prod_actual 变更影响到 group_output.id
INSERT INTO dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2 (id, table_name, status, enqueue_time)
SELECT DISTINCT
    a.id                                   AS id,
    'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output'         AS table_name,
    0                                      AS status,
    @to_ts                                 AS enqueue_time
FROM ods_mes_mm_task_group_output a
         JOIN ods_mes_mm_task_prod_actual b
              ON b.actual_id = a.actual_id
WHERE IFNULL(b.r_modified_time, '1970-01-01 00:00:00') >  @from_ts
  AND IFNULL(b.r_modified_time, '1970-01-01 00:00:00') <= @to_ts
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
                     -- PROCESSING(1) 不抢占；DONE(2) 允许回到 NEW(0) 以便重跑（如不希望重跑，见下方可选项）
                     dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2.status =
                         IF(dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2.status = 1,
                            dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2.status,
                            0),
                     dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2.enqueue_time =
                         GREATEST(dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2.enqueue_time,
                                  VALUES(enqueue_time));

-- 6) 入队②：group_output 自身变更影响到 id
INSERT INTO dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2 (id, table_name, status, enqueue_time)
SELECT
    a.id                                   AS id,
    'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output'         AS table_name,
    0                                      AS status,
    @to_ts                                 AS enqueue_time
FROM ods_mes_mm_task_group_output a
WHERE IFNULL(a.r_modified_time, '1970-01-01 00:00:00') >  @from_ts
  AND IFNULL(a.r_modified_time, '1970-01-01 00:00:00') <= @to_ts
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
                     dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2.status =
                         IF(dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2.status = 1,
                            dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2.status,
                            0),
                     dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2.enqueue_time =
                         GREATEST(dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2.enqueue_time,
                                  VALUES(enqueue_time));

-- 7) 统计本次入队数量（以 enqueue_time=@to_ts 统计）
UPDATE dwd_task_execution_log
SET enqueue_count = (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2
    WHERE table_name = 'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output'
      AND enqueue_time = @to_ts
)
WHERE task_name = 'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output'
  AND batch_id  = @enqueue_log_id;

-- 8) 推进入队水位（只要本事务成功就推进；失败回滚则不推进）
UPDATE dwd_update_tracker_v2
SET last_enqueued = @to_ts
WHERE table_name = 'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output';

-- 9) 日志：SUCCESS
UPDATE dwd_task_execution_log
SET end_time     = NOW(),
    duration_sec = TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, start_time, NOW()),
    status       = 1
WHERE task_name = 'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output'
  AND batch_id  =

-- =======================================
-- 【第五步】清空 汇总表

DELETE FROM ads_gx_xs_18_01;

-- =======================================

-- =======================================
-- 日汇总
INSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_18_01 (silicon_steel_product_category_name, data_date, attr1, attr2, attr3, attr4, attr5, attr6, attr7, sync_time, period)
SELECT
    b.silicon_steel_product_category_name,
    di.date_id AS data_date,
    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = '湖南宏旺' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr1,
    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = '佛山宏旺' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr2,
    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = '江苏宏旺' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr3,
    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = '河南宏旺' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr4,
    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = '成都宏旺' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr5,
    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = '佛山宏芯' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr6,
    SUM(CASE WHEN channel IN ('湖南宏旺', '佛山宏旺', '江苏宏旺', '河南宏旺', '成都宏旺', '佛山宏芯') THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr7,
    NOW() AS sync_time,
    'D' AS period
FROM
    (SELECT date_id FROM dim_date_info WHERE YEAR(date_id) >= 2025 AND date_id <= CURRENT_DATE) di
        LEFT JOIN
    (SELECT DISTINCT silicon_steel_product_category_name FROM ads_gx_xs_18_detail where silicon_steel_product_category_name is not null  ) b ON 1=1
        LEFT JOIN
    ads_gx_xs_18_detail de ON di.date_id = de.data_date AND b.silicon_steel_product_category_name = de.silicon_steel_product_category_name

GROUP BY
    b.silicon_steel_product_category_name, di.date_id;

INSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_18_01 (silicon_steel_product_category_name, data_date, attr1, attr2, attr3, attr4, attr5, attr6, attr7, sync_time, period)
-- 月汇总
SELECT
    silicon_steel_product_category_name,
    SUBSTR(data_date, 1, 7) AS month_date,
    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = '湖南宏旺' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr1,
    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = '佛山宏旺' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr2,
    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = '江苏宏旺' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr3,
    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = '河南宏旺' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr4,
    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = '成都宏旺' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr5,
    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = '佛山宏芯' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr6,
    SUM(CASE WHEN channel IN ('湖南宏旺', '佛山宏旺', '江苏宏旺', '河南宏旺', '成都宏旺', '佛山宏芯') THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr7,
    NOW() AS sync_time,
    'M' AS period
FROM ads_gx_xs_18_detail
GROUP BY silicon_steel_product_category_name, SUBSTR(data_date, 1, 7);
with ads_gx_xs_18_01_process1 as (SELECT silicon_steel_product_category_name,
                                         SUBSTR(return_created_time, 1, 7)                                            AS data_date,

                                         SUM(CASE WHEN channel = '河南宏旺' THEN IFNULL(return_weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr4,
                                         SUM(CASE WHEN channel = '成都宏旺' THEN IFNULL(return_weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr5,
                                         SUM(CASE WHEN channel = '佛山宏芯' THEN IFNULL(return_weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr6,
                                         SUM(CASE
                                                 WHEN channel IN ('湖南宏旺', '佛山宏旺', '江苏宏旺', '河南宏旺', '成都宏旺', '佛山宏芯')
                                                     THEN IFNULL(return_weight, 0) END) /

INSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_18_detail

SELECT si.silicon_steel_product_category_name,
       t.out_warehouse,
       ti.cust_code,
       ti.cust_abbr,
       ti.batch_code,
       ti.quantity,
       bi.steel_grade,
       bi.surface,
       bi.grade,
       bi.spec,
       null                                                           iron_loss,
       t.transfer_order_code,
       t.transfer_order_date,
       IFNULL(rd.actual_return_exchange_quantity, 0)               AS return_weight,
       rd.created_time as  return_created_time,
       ti.quantity AS weight,
       0.0,
       ww.wh_name,
       '湖南宏旺'                                                  AS channel,
       ti.contract_code,
       CASE
           WHEN DATE(t.transfer_order_date) IS NULL THEN date(t.approve_date)
           ELSE DATE(t.transfer_order_date)
           END                                                     AS data_date,
       ti.receive_warehouse

FROM ods_crm_sa_transfer_order t
         JOIN ods_crm_sa_transfer_order_detail ti ON t.transfer_order_id = ti.transfer_order_id AND ti.STATUS = 1
         JOIN ods_mes_wms_warehouse ww
              ON t.in_warehouse_code = ww.wh_code AND ww.STATUS = 1 AND SUBSTR(ww.wh_name, 1, 1) = 'B'
                  and ww.wh_code <> 2098
         LEFT JOIN ods_crm_sv_return_detail rd ON ti.contract_code = rd.contract_code AND ti.batch_code = rd.batch_code     and rd.return_detail_status in (20,30,40)

         JOIN ods_mes_wms_batch_info bi
              ON ti.batch_code = bi.batch_code and bi.`status` = 1 and t.tenant_id = bi.tenant_id
         JOIN dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info si ON bi.surface = si.surface and si.silicon_steel_product_category_name is not null

WHERE t.transfer_order_state in (20, 40)
  AND t.STATUS = 1
  AND YEAR(t.transfer_order_date) >= '2025'
  and t.tenant_id in (92,108);

set a.place= b.receive_warehouse

;

dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
START TRANSACTION;
DELETE
from ads_gx_xs_12_detail;
insert into ads_gx_xs_12_detail
SELECT sc.tenant_id,
       CASE

           WHEN
               JSON_EXTRACT(sc.ext_property, '$.foreignTradeContract') <> 1
                   AND contract_type IN (10, 20, 30) THEN
               '内贸期货'
           WHEN JSON_EXTRACT(sc.ext_property, '$.foreignTradeContract') <> 1
               AND contract_type = 70 THEN
               '内贸现货'
           WHEN JSON_EXTRACT(sc.ext_property, '$.foreignTradeContract') = 1
               AND contract_type IN (10, 20, 30) THEN
               '外贸期货'
           when sc.contract_type = 50  then '加工合同'
           ELSE '未匹配'
           END                          export_contract_type,
       sc.grouping_mark,
       sc.parent_contract_code,
       scd.prod_class,
       dict.dict_name                   prod_class_name,
       scd.prod_spec1                   steel_grade,
       scd.prod_spec2                   surface,
       scd.prod_spec3                   spec,
       scd.prod_spec4                   grade,
       si.surface_thickness,
       si.surface_number,
       sc.contract_type,
       a.dict_name                      contract_type_name,
       sc.contract_month,
       sc.contract_code,
       scd.contract_detail_code,
       sc.contract_state,
       b.dict_name                      contract_state_name,
       sc.cust_code,
       sc.cust_abbr,
       CASE

           WHEN JSON_EXTRACT(sc.ext_property, '$.foreignTradeContract') = 1 THEN
               '是'
           ELSE '否'
           END                          is_export,
       ROUND(SUM(CASE
                     WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.weight / 1000
                     WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.weight
                     ELSE 0 END), 2) AS weight,


       SUM(scd.amount)               AS amount,


       SUM(scd.amount_in_tax)        AS amount_in_tax,

       ROUND(SUM(CASE
                     WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_allocated / 1000
                     WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_allocated
                     ELSE 0 END), 2) AS quantity_allocated,

       ROUND(SUM(CASE
                     WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_remain / 1000
                     WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_remain
                     ELSE 0 END), 2) AS quantity_remain,

       ROUND(SUM(CASE
                     WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_allocated_not_saled / 1000
                     WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_allocated_not_saled
                     ELSE 0 END), 2) AS quantity_allocated_not_saled,

       ROUND(SUM(CASE
                     WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_shipped / 1000
                     WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_shipped
                     ELSE 0 END), 2) AS quantity_shipped,

       ROUND(SUM(CASE
                     WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped / 1000
                     WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped
                     ELSE 0 END), 2) AS quantity_unshipped,

       ROUND(SUM(CASE
                     WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_returned / 1000
                     WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_returned
                     ELSE 0 END), 2) AS quantity_returned,
       round(
               sum(scd.amount_in_tax) / nullif(sum(CASE
                                                       WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.weight / 1000
                                                       WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.weight
                                                       ELSE 0 END), 0)
           ,2)                        base_price,
       sc.delivery_date,
       DATE(sc.e_seal_date)            data_date,
       now()                            sync_time,
       sc.salesman_code,
       sc.salesman,
       sc.currency,
       ''                            AS attr1,
       ''                            AS remark
FROM ods_crm_sa_contr

DELETE
FROM
    ads_sc_xl_13_defined
WHERE
    data_date >= CURDATE() - INTERVAL 35 day;
INSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_defined (
    data_date,
    tenant_id,
    plate_type,
    surface,
    attr1,
    steel_grade_series,
    group_manuf_line_name,
    manuf_line_name,
    weight,
    quantity,
    lower_weight,
    lower_quantity,
    manufacturing_finished_output_length,
    lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,
    MONTH,
    YEAR) SELECT
              dr.date_id AS data_date,
              t.tenant_id,
              t.plate_type,
              t.surface,
              t.attr1,
              t.steel_grade_series,
              t.group_manuf_line_name,
              t.manuf_line_name,
              COALESCE(orig.weight, 0) AS weight,
              COALESCE(orig.quantity, 0) AS quantity,
              COALESCE(orig.lower_weight, 0) AS lower_weight,
              COALESCE(orig.lower_quantity, 0) AS lower_quantity,
              COALESCE(orig.manufacturing_finished_output_length, 0) AS manufacturing_finished_output_length,
              COALESCE(orig.lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length, 0) AS lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,
              COALESCE(orig.MONTH, '未知') AS MONTH,
              COALESCE(orig.YEAR, '未知') AS YEAR
FROM
    (SELECT date_id FROM dim_date_info WHERE date_id <= CURDATE() AND date_id >= CURDATE() - INTERVAL 35 DAY) AS dr
        JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT tenant_id, plate_type, surface, attr1, steel_grade_series, group_manuf_line_name, manuf_line_name FROM ads_sc_xl_13_process1 where data_date >= CURDATE() - INTERVAL 350 DAY) AS t
        LEFT JOIN ads_sc_xl_13_process1 orig ON dr.date_id = orig.data_date
        AND t.tenant_id = orig.tenant_id
        AND t.plate_type = orig.plate_type
        AND t.surface = orig.surface
        AND
                                                CASE

                                                    WHEN t.attr1 IS NULL THEN
                                                        1 = 1 ELSE t.attr1 = orig.attr1
                                                    END
        AND t.steel_grade_series = orig.steel_grade_series
        AND t.group_manuf_line_name = orig.group_manuf_line_name
        AND t.manuf_line_name = orig.manuf_line_name
;
delete from ads_sc_xl_13_defined  where tenant_id =92 and manuf_line_name ='TCM' and attr1 is null ;
delete from ads_sc_xl_13_defined  where tenant_id =92 and manuf_line_name in ('1#SACL','2#SACL') and attr1 is null ;

dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
DELETE
FROM
    ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_avg_thickness_data_month
;
INSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_avg_thickness_data_month SELECT
                                                                               a.tenant_id,
                                                                               a.plate_type,
                                                                               a.defined_manuf_line_name manuf_line_name,
                                                                               a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1 attr1,
                                                                               CASE

                                                                                   WHEN SUM(c.roll_length) = 0 THEN
                                                                                       0 ELSE SUM(c.act_height * c.roll_length) / SUM(c.roll_length)
                                                                                   END average_thickness,
                                                                               substr(a.data_date,1,7) data_date
FROM
    dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output a
        JOIN ods_mes_mm_task_prod_actual c ON a.actual_id = c.actual_id
        AND c.`status` = 1
WHERE
   a.plate_type IS NOT NULL
  AND manuf_line_name IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
    a.tenant_id,
    a.plate_type,
    a.defined_manuf_line_name ,
    a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1 ,
    substr(a.data_date,1,7) ;
UPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined AS target
    INNER JOIN ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_avg_thickness_data_month AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id
        AND target.plate_type = source.plate_type
        AND target.month = source.data_date
        AND target.manuf_line_name = source.manuf_line_name
        AND CASE WHEN target.attr1 IS NULL THEN 1 = 1 ELSE target.attr1 = source.attr1  END
SET target.day_average_thickness = source.average_thickness;

INSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_output_tons_lz SELECT
                                                                             a.tenant_id,
                                                                             b.attribute1 AS manuf_line_name,
                                                                             a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1 attr1,
                                                                             SUM(CASE WHEN a.tenant_id = 80 AND a.wh_code = 'HNZZ6' AND a.rd_style = 0102 THEN 0 ELSE weight END) / 1000 AS manufacturing_finished_output_tons,
                                                                             SUM(CASE WHEN a.tenant_id = 80 AND a.wh_code = 'HNZZ6' AND a.rd_style = 0102 THEN 0 ELSE quantity END) AS manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,
                                                                             a.data_date,a.month
FROM
    ads_sc_xl_01 a
        JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id
        AND b.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-013-WH-CODE-DEFINED-LZ'
        AND (b.attribute2 = '*' OR a.wh_code = b.attribute2)
        AND (b.attribute5 = '*' OR a.dept_code = b.attribute5)
        AND (b.attribute3 = '*' OR a.steel_grade = b.attribute3)
        AND (b.attribute4 = '*' OR a.sku_code = b.attribute4)
        AND (b.attribute6 = '*' OR a.machine_code = b.attribute6)
WHERE
    a.bill_type = 2
  AND a.data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
  AND a.rd_style <> '1101'
GROUP BY
    a.tenant_id,
    b.attribute1,
    a.data_date,
    a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1;
UPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined AS target
    INNER JOIN ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_output_tons_lz AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id
        AND target.data_date = source.data_date
        AND target.manuf_line_name = source.manuf_line_name
        AND case when  target.attr1  is null then 1=1 else target.attr1 = source.attr1  end
SET target.day_manufacturing_finished_output_tons = source.manufacturing_finished_output_tons,
    target.day_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity = source.manufacturing_finished_output_quantity;

                                                                          a.tenant_id,
                                                                          b.attribute1 manuf_line_name,
                                                                          a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1 attr1,
                                                                          SUM(a.weight) / 1000 AS manufacturing_finished_product,
                                                                          SUM(a.quantity) AS manufacturing_finished_product_quantity,
                                                                          a.data_date
FROM
    ads_sc_xl_01 a
        JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id
        AND b.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-013-WH-CODE-FINISHED-DEFINED-JJG'
        AND (b.attribute2 IN ('*', '') OR a.wh_code = b.attribute2)
        AND (b.attribute5 IN ('*', '') OR a.dept_code = b.attribute5)
        AND (b.attribute3 IN ('*', '') OR a.steel_grade = b.attribute3)
        AND (b.attribute4 IN ('*', '') OR a.sku_code = b.attribute4)
        AND (b.attribute6 IN ('*', '') OR a.machine_code = b.attribute6)
        AND (b.attribute7 IN ('*', '') OR a.other_machine_code = b.attribute7)
        JOIN with_attr_value c ON a.tenant_id = c.tenant_id
        AND c.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-013-RD-FINISHED-DEFINED-JJG'
        AND a.rd_style_name = c.attribute1
WHERE
    a.bill_type = 2
  AND a.data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
GROUP BY

dolphin_task_hits.name: ADS_SC_XL_13_PROCESS_001
dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
DELETE
FROM
    ads_sc_xl_13_process1  where data_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 35 day
;
INSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_process1    SELECT
                                         a.tenant_id,
                                         a.plate_type,
                                         a.surface,
                                         a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1 attr1,
                                         a.steel_grade_series,
                                         a.defined_manuf_line_name group_manuf_line_name,
                                         a.defined_manuf_line_name manuf_line_name,
                                         a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_dataDate  data_date,
                                         sum( a.weight )/ 1000 weight,
                                         sum( a.quantity ) quantity,
                                         sum( CASE WHEN a.grade in ('A','R') or a.batch_code like '%-RD' or (a.tenant_id= '79' and a.defined_manuf_line_name in ('飞剪一组','平板一组')) or is_retention = 1 THEN 0   ELSE a.weight END )/ 1000 lower_weight,
                                         sum(CASE WHEN a.grade in ('A','R') or a.batch_code like '%-RD' or (a.tenant_id= '79' and a.defined_manuf_line_name in ('飞剪一组','平板一组') )or is_retention = 1 THEN 0   ELSE a.quantity END )/ 1000 lower_quantity,
                                         sum( a.roll_length ) manufacturing_finished_output_length,
                                         sum( CASE WHEN a.grade in ('A','R') or a.batch_code like '%-RD' or (a.tenant_id= '79' and a.defined_manuf_line_name in ('飞剪一组','平板一组')) or is_retention = 1 THEN 0   ELSE a.roll_length END ) lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,
                                         DATE_FORMAT( a.data_date, '%Y-%m' ) MONTH,
                                         YEAR ( a.data_date ) YEAR
FROM
    dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output a
WHERE a.plate_type is not null
  and  a.defined_manuf_line_name  is not null
  and a.batch_code is not null
  and a.batch_code <> '' and a.is_ignore=0
  AND tenant_id IN('80','92')

ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE modified_time = NOW();
