        b.ATTRIBUTE2
    FROM
        dwd_wh_output_item a
            JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id
            AND b.scene = 'bi_sc_xl_009_WH'
            AND (
                                          (b.ATTRIBUTE1 = '*' OR a.wh_code = b.ATTRIBUTE1)
                                              AND (b.attribute3 = '*' OR a.steel_grade = b.attribute3)
                                              AND (b.attribute4 = '*' OR a.sku_code = b.attribute4))
    WHERE
        a.bill_type = '2'
      AND b.ATTRIBUTE2 IN ('取向出库领用')
    GROUP BY
        a.tenant_id,
        a.data_date,
        b.ATTRIBUTE2) -- 更新取向出库领用
UPDATE ads_SC_XL_09 AS dest
    JOIN temp_out_quantity AS src ON dest.tenant_id = src.tenant_id
        AND src.ATTRIBUTE2 = '取向出库领用'
        AND dest.data_date = src.data_date
SET dest.qx_out_quantity = src.out_quantity
WHERE
    dest.period = 'D';
WITH temp_out_quantity AS (
    SELECT
        a.tenant_id,
        a.data_date,
        SUM(a.quantity) / 1000 AS out_quantity,

    FROM

                                              AND (b.attribute4 = '*' OR a.sku_code = b.attribute4))
    WHERE

      AND b.ATTRIBUTE2 IN ('无取向出库领用')

        a.tenant_id,

UPDATE ads_SC_XL_09 AS dest

        AND src.ATTRIBUTE2 = '无取向出库领用'
        AND dest.data_date = src.data_date
SET dest.wqx_out_quantity = src.out_quantity
WHERE
    dest.period = 'D';
WITH temp_out_quantity AS (
    SELECT
        a.tenant_id,
        a.data_date,
        SUM(a.quantity) / 1000 AS out_quantity,
        b.ATTRIBUTE2
    FROM

SET dest.xny_out_quantity = src.out_quantity

            data_date - INTERVAL 1 DAY data_date

                AND b.ATTRIBUTE2 = '新能源待销售量'
                AND b.scene = 'bi_sc_xl_009_WH'
                AND  (b.ATTRIBUTE1 ='*' OR a.wh_code = b.ATTRIBUTE1  )
                and ( b.attribute3 = '*' OR  a.steel_grade= b.attribute3  )
                and ( b.attribute4 = '*' OR a.sku_code= b.attribute4  )
        WHERE
            a.`status` = 1
          AND a.tenant_id = '92'
          AND a.order_status = '00'
          AND a.is_handle = '0'

FROM

INSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name (
    tenant_id,
    plate_type,
    group_manuf_line_name,
    manuf_line_name,
    attr1,
    data_date,
    weight,
    quantity,
    average_thickness,
    lower_weight,

               a.tenant_id,
               a.plate_type,
               a.group_manuf_line_name,
               a.manuf_line_name,
               a.attr1,

               SUM(a.weight) weight,
               SUM(a.quantity) quantity,
               '0.0' average_thickness,
               SUM(a.lower_weight) lower_weight,
               SUM(a.lower_quantity) lower_quantity,
               '0.0' breakdown_frequency,
               '0.0' planned_downtime,

               '0.0' manufacturing_finished_output_tons,

                  d.`planned_downtime` AS day_planned_downtime,
                  d.`unplanned_downtime` AS day_unplanned_downtime,
                  d.`manufacturing_finished_output_tons` AS day_manufacturing_finished_output_tons,
                  d.`manufacturing_finished_output_quantity` AS day_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,
                  d.`manufacturing_finished_output_length` AS day_manufacturing_finished_output_length,
                  d.`lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length` AS day_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,
                  d.`manufacturing_finished_product` AS day_manufacturing_finished_product,
                  d.`manufacturing_finished_product_quantity` AS day_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity,
                  DATE_FORMAT(d.`data_date`, '%Y-%m') AS MONTH,
                  YEAR(d.`data_date`) AS YEAR,
                  d.`rk`,
                  d.`remark`
FROM

        join (SELECT tenant_id,attribute4 FROM with_attr_value WHERE scene in('BI-SC-KC-013-DEFINED-PLATE-JJG','BI-SC-KC-013-DEFINED-PLATE-LZ','BI-SC-KC-013-DEFINED-PLATE-GG')  )b
             on d.tenant_id =b.tenant_id and d.manuf_line_name=b.attribute4
WHERE
    d.data_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 35 DAY  ;


UPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined AS target
    INNER JOIN (SELECT tenant_id, attribute5 plate_type, attribute4 manuf_line_name, list_order FROM with_attr_value WHERE scene IN ('BI-SC-KC-013-DEFINED-PLATE-LZ', 'BI-SC-KC-013-DEFINED-PLATE-JJG', 'BI-SC-KC-013-DEFINED-PLATE-GG')) AS monthly ON target.tenant_id = monthly.tenant_id
        AND target.manuf_line_name = monthly.manuf_line_name
        AND target.plate_type = monthly.plate_type
SET target.rk = monthly.list_order;

    '无取向' type,
    case when wqx_practical_enter =  0 then 0 else round(wqx_a_weight/wqx_practical_enter* 100, 2 ) end  a_rate ,
    wqx_practical_enter weight,
    sum( CASE WHEN b.attribute1 = '无取向' THEN b.attribute3 ELSE 0 END ) plan,
    case when wqx_practical_enter =  0 then 0 else round( wqx_practical_enter / sum( CASE WHEN b.attribute1 = '无取向' THEN b.attribute3 ELSE 0 END )* 100, 2 ) end  rate,
    MONTH ,0
FROM
    ads_sc_xl_09 a
        JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.data_date = b.attribute2
        AND a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id
        AND b.scene = 'bi_sc_xl_009_PLAN'
WHERE
    `period` = 'M'
  AND a.tenant_id = 92
GROUP BY
    a.tenant_id,
    data_date,
    wqx_practical_enter UNION ALL
SELECT
    a.tenant_id,
    '新能源' type,
    case when xny_practical_enter =  0 then 0 else round(xny_a_weight/xny_practical_enter* 100, 2 ) end  a_rate ,
    xny_practical_enter weight,
    sum( CASE WHEN b.attribute1 = '新能源' THEN b.attribute3 ELSE 0 END ) plan,
    case when xny_practical_enter =  0 then 0 else round( xny_practical_enter / sum( CASE WHEN b.attribute1 = '新能源' THEN b.attribute3 ELSE 0 END )* 100, 2 ) end  rate,
    MONTH ,0
FROM
    ads_sc_xl_09 a
        JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.data_date = b.attribute2
        AND a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id
        AND b.scene = 'bi_sc_xl_009_PLAN'
WHERE
    `period` = 'M'
  AND a.tenant_id = 92
GROUP BY
    a.tenant_id,
    data_date,
    xny_practical_enter ;




UPDATE ads_SC_XL_09_YIELD_RATE AS target
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT
            tenant_id,
            a.month,
            a.days/b.days*100 actually_rate
        from
            (SELECT tenant_id,month,max(day(data_date)) days from  ads_sc_xl_09 where period='D' group by tenant_id,month) a
                join

            (SELECT substr(date_id,1,7) month ,max(day)  days from dim_date_info  group by substr(date_id,1,7) ) b  on a.month=b.month

    ) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id
        AND  source.month  = target.month
SET
    target.actually_rate = source.actually_rate ;

dolphin_task_hits.name: 取向发货情况表-下游客户（ads_gx_xs_18_06）
dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
-- 建议：清空表用 TRUNCATE 更快（有外键时再用 DELETE）
DELETE  FROM ads_gx_xs_18_06;

/* 明细插入 */
INSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_18_06 (
    silicon_steel_product_category_name,
    data_date,
    cus_name,
    surface,
    a_quantity, b_quantity, c_quantity, d_quantity,
    quantity,
    avg_amount_in_tax,
    rk
)
WITH av_one AS (
    SELECT
        attribute1 AS place,
        MAX(NULLIF(TRIM(attribute3), '')) AS attr3
    FROM with_attr_value
    WHERE scene = 'bi_gx_xs_018_detail_qx_downstream_customer_t92_di'
    GROUP BY attribute1
),
     base AS (
         SELECT
             a.silicon_steel_product_category_name,
             a.data_date,
             /* 你后续总是把前缀改成“湖南宏旺-”，这里直接统一 */
             CONCAT('湖南宏旺-', a.cust_abbr, '-', COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(av.attr3), ''), a.place)) AS cus_name,
             a.surface,
             a.grade,
             a.weight,
             a.amount_in_tax
         FROM ads_gx_xs_18_detail a
                  LEFT JOIN av_one av
                            ON av.place = a.place
         WHERE a.silicon_steel_product_category_name = '取向硅钢成品'
           AND a.data_date >= DATE('2025-01-01')
         -- 如果你只要“今天”，放开下面这一行
         -- AND a.data_date = CURRENT_DATE
     ),
     agg_detail AS (
         /* 明细：按 cus_name + surface + 日期 聚合（含 a/b/c/d 及总量、均价） */
         SELECT
             silicon_steel_product_category_name,
             data_date,
             cus_name,
             surface,
             SUM(CASE WHEN grade = 'a' THEN weight  END) / 1000 AS a_quantity,
             SUM(CASE WHEN grade = 'b' THEN weight  END) / 1000 AS b_quantity,
             SUM(CASE WHEN grade = 'c' THEN weight  END) / 1000 AS c_quantity,
             SUM(CASE WHEN grade = 'd' THEN weight  END) / 1000 AS d_quantity,
             SUM(CASE WHEN grade IN ('a','b','c','d') THEN weight  END) / 1000 AS quantity,
             /* 含税均价 = 总含税额 / 总重量 * 1000；防零除 */
             (SUM(amount_in_tax) / NULLIF(SUM(weight), 0)) * 1000 AS avg_amount_in_tax,
             1 AS order_type
         FROM base
         GROUP BY silicon_steel_product_category_name, data_date, cus_name, surface
     ),
     agg_total AS (
         /* 合计：按 日期 汇总（cus_name='合计'，surface=''） */
         SELECT
             silicon_steel_product_category_name,
             data_date,
             '合计' AS cus_name,
             ''     AS surface,
             SUM(CASE WHEN grade = 'a' THEN weight  END) / 1000 AS a_quantity,
             SUM(CASE WHEN grade = 'b' THEN weight  END) / 1000 AS b_quantity,
             SUM(CASE WHEN grade = 'c' THEN weight  END) / 1000 AS c_quantity,
             SUM(CASE WHEN grade = 'd' THEN weight  END) / 1000 AS d_quantity,
             SUM(CASE WHEN grade IN ('a','b','c','d') THEN weight  END) / 1000 AS quantity,
             (SUM(amount_in_tax) / NULLIF(SUM(weight), 0)) * 1000 AS avg_amount_in_tax,
             2 AS order_type
         FROM base
         GROUP BY silicon_steel_product_category_name, data_date
     )

SELECT
    silicon_steel_product_category_name, data_date, cus_name, surface,
    a_quantity, b_quantity, c_quantity, d_quantity,
    quantity, avg_amount_in_tax, order_type
FROM agg_detail
UNION ALL
SELECT
    silicon_steel_product_category_name, data_date, cus_name, surface,
    a_quantity, b_quantity, c_quantity, d_quantity,
    quantity, avg_amount_in_tax, order_type
FROM agg_total;

dolphin_task_hits.name: ads_sc_zl_07_04（报表-生产-质量-工序成材率-机台分组-日报表）
dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
delete  from ads_sc_zl_07_04_process1 ;
insert into ads_sc_zl_07_04_process1
SELECT
    a.tenant_id,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.attribute2), ''), b.machine_name) AS machine_group,
    a.attribute3 AS steel_grade,
    MAX(a.list_order) AS list_order
FROM with_attr_value a
         JOIN ods_mes_mm_machine b
              ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id
                  AND a.attribute1 = b.machine_code
                  AND b.status = 1
WHERE a.scene = 'BI-SC-ZL-007-RK'
GROUP BY
    a.tenant_id,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.attribute2), ''), b.machine_name),
    a.attribute3;
DELETE
FROM ads_sc_zl_07_04 where data_date >= current_date - interval  30 day ;
INSERT INTO ads_sc_zl_07_04 (tenant_id, machine_group, steel_grade, split_in_weight, net_weight,
                             yield_rate, waste_rate, waste_t_weight, data_date, list_order)
WITH recent_dates AS (
    SELECT date_id
    FROM dim_date_info
    WHERE date_id >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 30 DAY and  date_id <= CURRENT_DATE
)
SELECT
    av.tenant_id,
    av.machine_group,
    av.steel_grade,
    SUM(COALESCE(m.split_in_weight, 0)) / 1000 AS split_in_weight,
    SUM(COALESCE(m.net_weight, 0)) / 1000 AS net_weight,
    CASE
        WHEN SUM(COALESCE(m.split_in_weight, 0)) = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE SUM(COALESCE(m.net_weight, 0)) / SUM(COALESCE(m.split_in_weight, 0))
        END AS yield_rate,
    CASE
        WHEN SUM(COALESCE(m.split_in_weight, 0)) = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE 1 - (SUM(COALESCE(m.net_weight, 0)) / SUM(COALESCE(m.split_in_weight, 0)))
        END AS waste_rate,
    (SUM(COALESCE(m.split_in_weight, 0)) - SUM(COALESCE(m.net_weight, 0))) / 1000 AS waste_t_weight,
    d.date_id AS data_date,
    av.list_order
FROM recent_dates d
         JOIN ads_sc_zl_07_04_process1 av
         LEFT JOIN ads_material_yield_rate_detail m
                   ON m.tenant_id = av.tenant_id
                       AND m.machine_group = av.machine_group
                       AND m.steel_grade = av.steel_grade
                       AND m.data_date = d.date_id
GROUP BY
    av.tenant_id,
    av.machine_group,
    av.steel_grade,
    d.date_id,
    av.list_order;

dolphin_task_hits.name: 报表-生产-辅料仓-每日出库（ads_sc_kc_09）
dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
-- 结合日期分区，减少扫描
DELETE FROM ads_sc_kc_09
WHERE data_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 35 DAY AND period = 'D';

-- 批量插入避免逐行插入
INSERT INTO ads_sc_kc_09(
    tenant_id,
    dept_class,
    data_date,
    amount,
    scfl_amount,
    fscfl_amount,
    period,
    amount_rank,
    scfl_amount_rank,
    fscfl_amount_rank
)
SELECT
    av.tenant_id,
    av.dept_class,
    date.date_id AS data_date,
    IFNULL(a.amount, 0) AS amount,
    IFNULL(a.scfl_amount, 0) AS scfl_amount,
    IFNULL(a.fscfl_amount, 0) AS fscfl_amount,
    'D' AS period,
    IFNULL(a.amount_rank, 999) AS amount_rank,
    IFNULL(a.scfl_amount_rank, 999) AS scfl_amount_rank,
    IFNULL(a.fscfl_amount_rank, 999) AS fscfl_amount_rank
FROM
    (SELECT DISTINCT tenant_id, attribute2 AS dept_class FROM with_attr_value WHERE scene = 'BI_SC_KC_009_DEPT') av
        LEFT JOIN (SELECT date_id FROM dim_date_info WHERE date_id >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 35 DAY AND date_id <= CURRENT_DATE) date ON 1 = 1
        LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT
            tenant_id,
            dept_class,
            data_date,
            amount,
            scfl_amount,
            fscfl_amount,
            RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, data_date ORDER BY amount DESC) AS amount_rank,
            RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, data_date ORDER BY scfl_amount DESC) AS scfl_amount_rank,
            RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, data_date ORDER BY fscfl_amount DESC) AS fscfl_amount_rank
        FROM
            (SELECT
                 tenant_id,
                 dept_class,
                 data_date,
                 SUM(amount) AS amount,
                 SUM(CASE WHEN is_scsku = 1 THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS scfl_amount,
                 SUM(CASE WHEN is_scsku = 1 THEN 0 ELSE amount END) AS fscfl_amount
             FROM
                 dwd_9901_mes_wms_wh_output_item
             GROUP BY
                 tenant_id,
                 dept_class,
                 data_date
            ) AS aggregated_data
    ) a ON a.tenant_id = av.tenant_id AND av.dept_class = a.dept_class AND date.date_id = a.data_date
WHERE
    av.dept_class IS NOT NULL;

-- 删除月度数据
DELETE FROM ads_sc_kc_09 WHERE period = 'M';

-- 批量插入月度聚合数据
INSERT INTO ads_sc_kc_09(
    tenant_id,
    dept_class,
    data_date,
    amount,
    scfl_amount,
    fscfl_amount,
    period,
    amount_rank,
    scfl_amount_rank,
    fscfl_amount_rank
)
SELECT
    tenant_id,
    dept_class,
    data_date,
    SUM(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, dept_class, DATE_FORMAT(data_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY data_date) AS amount,
    SUM(scfl_amount) OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, dept_class, DATE_FORMAT(data_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY data_date) AS scfl_amount,
    SUM(fscfl_amount) OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, dept_class, DATE_FORMAT(data_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY data_date) AS fscfl_amount,
    'M' AS period,
    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, data_date ORDER BY amount DESC) AS amount_rank,
    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, data_date ORDER BY scfl_amount DESC) AS scfl_amount_rank,
    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, data_date ORDER BY fscfl_amount DESC) AS fscfl_amount_rank
FROM
    ads_sc_kc_09
WHERE
    period = 'D'
GROUP BY
    tenant_id,
    dept_class,
    data_date;

;

    FROM dwd_9901_mes_wms_wh_output_item s
    WHERE s.tenant_id = t.tenant_

dolphin_task_hits.name: dwd_9901_mes_wms_wh_output_item
dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
DELETE from  dwd_9901_mes_wms_wh_output_item;

-- 插入操作保持不变
INSERT INTO dwd_9901_mes_wms_wh_output_item
SELECT
    o.dept_code,
    sd.dept_name,
    IFNULL(av.attribute2, '无') dept_class,
    sku.finance_type cw_sku,
    CASE WHEN av2.attribute1 IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS is_scsku,
    o.bred_vouch,
    o.output_code,
    o.output_date,
    o.verify_status,
    o.checked_by,
    o.checked_time,
    o.note AS output_note,
    o.bill_type,
    o.rd_flag,
    o.rd_style,
    o.source,
    o.u8_output_code,
    o.ven_code,
    o.print_times,
    oi.output_item_id,
    oi.output_id,
    pc.cat_code,
    pc.cat_name,
    pcc.cat_code AS top_cat_code,
    pcc.cat_name AS top_cat_name,
    oi.sku_code,
    sku.model,
    oi.unit,
    oi.batch_code,
    oi.steel_grade,
    oi.spec,
    oi.surface,
    oi.grade,
    oi.quantity,
    oi.unit_price,
    oi.amount,
    oi.note,
    oi.mo_code,
    oi.free1,
    oi.free2,
    oi.free3,
    oi.free4,
    oi.free5,
    oi.free6,
    oi.free7,
    oi.free8,
    oi.free9,
    oi.free10,
    oi.bill_status,
    oi.`status`,
    oi.created_by,
    oi.created_time,
    oi.modified_by,
    oi.modified_time,
    oi.tenant_id,
    oi.row_ver,
    oi.row_no,
    oi.u8_output_item_id,
    oi.producer,
    oi.act_height,
    oi.act_width,
    oi.coating,
    oi.gross_weight,
    oi.py_wh_code,
    oi.wh_pos_code,
    oi.equipment_code,
    oi.project_code,
    oi.r_modified_time,
    oi.note AS item_note,
    CASE
        WHEN (o.receiver IS NULL OR o.receiver = "undefined" OR o.receiver = '') THEN NULL
        ELSE o.receiver
        END AS receiver,
    tenant.tenant_code,
    tenant.tenant_name,
    sku.sku_name,
    sku.sku_desc,
    sku.sku_type,
    ww.wh_code,
    ww.wh_name,
    supp.supplier_name,
    DATE_FORMAT(o.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS data_date,
    DATE_FORMAT(o.created_time, '%Y-%m') AS MONTH,
    DATE_FORMAT(o.created_time, '%Y') AS YEAR
FROM
    ods_mes_wms_wh_output o
        INNER JOIN ods_mes_wms_wh_output_item oi ON o.output_id = oi.output_id AND oi.STATUS = 1
        JOIN ods_mes_pm_sku sku ON oi.sku_code = sku.sku_code AND sku.STATUS = 1
        JOIN dim_ums_tenant tenant ON o.tenant_id = tenant.tenant_id AND tenant.STATUS = 1
        JOIN ods_mes_wms_warehouse ww ON ww.wh_code = o.wh_code AND ww.tenant_id = o.tenant_id AND ww.STATUS = 1
        JOIN ods_mes_sys_department sd ON o.dept_code = sd.dept_code AND o.tenant_id = sd.tenant_id AND sd.`status` = '1'
        LEFT JOIN with_attr_value av ON o.tenant_id = av.tenant_id AND o.dept_code = av.attribute1 AND av.scene = 'BI_SC_KC_009_DEPT'
        JOIN with_attr_value av1 ON o.tenant_id = av1.tenant_id AND o.wh_code = av1.attribute1 AND av1.scene = 'BI_SC_KC_009_WH'
        LEFT JOIN with_attr_value av2 ON o.tenant_id = av2.tenant_id AND oi.sku_code = av2.attribute1 AND av2.scene = 'BI_SC_KC_009_SCSKU'
        LEFT JOIN ods_mes_sys_supplier supp ON o.ven_code = supp.supplier_code AND supp.`status` = 1
        JOIN ods_mes_pm_cat pc ON sku.cat_id = pc.cat_id AND pc.`status` = '1'
        JOIN ods_mes_pm_cat pcc ON pc.parent_id = pcc.cat_id AND pcc.`status` = '1'
WHERE
    o.STATUS = 1
  AND o.bill_type = '2' ;

dolphin_task_hits.name: 打包机台（dwd_task_pack）
dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
START TRANSACTION;

DELETE dtp
FROM dwd_task_pack AS dtp
         JOIN (
    SELECT omt.pack_id
    FROM ods_mes_mm_task_pack AS omt
    WHERE omt.r_modified_time > (
        SELECT last_updated
        FROM dwd_update_tracker
        WHERE table_name = 'dwd_task_pack'
    )
) AS toDelete ON dtp.pack_id = toDelete.pack_id;


-- 插入新的或更新的数据
INSERT INTO dwd_task_pack
SELECT DISTINCT
    omt.pack_id,
    omt.task_inst_id,
    omt.sku_code,
    omt.batch_code,
    omt.wh_code,
    omt.py_wh_code,
    omt.wh_area_code,
    omt.wh_pos_code,
    omt.pack_status,
    omt.tenant_id,
    omt.status,
    omt.created_by,
    omt.created_time,
    omt.modified_by,
    omt.modified_time,
    omt.output_item_id,
    omt.output_id,
    omt.enter_task_id,
    omt.packing_method,
    omt.unique_code,
    omt.in_batch_code,
    omt.enter_item_id,
    omt.enter_id,
    omt.in_unique_code,
    oit.make_order_num,
    oit.machine_code,
    oi.order_item_code,
    opa.output_time,
    omt.r_modified_time
FROM
    ods_mes_mm_task_pack AS omt
        INNER JOIN ods_mes_mm_order_item_task AS oit ON omt.task_inst_id = oit.task_inst_id AND oit.status = 1
        INNER JOIN ods_mes_mm_order_item AS oi ON oi.order_item_id = oit.order_item_id AND oi.status = 1
        LEFT JOIN ods_mes_mm_task_prod_actual AS opa ON opa.batch_code = omt.batch_code AND opa.status = 1
WHERE
    omt.status = 1 AND oi.order_status IN ('R', 'P', 'H')
  AND omt.r_modified_time > (
    SELECT last_updated
    FROM dwd_update_tracker
    WHERE table_name = 'dwd_task_pack'
);

-- 更新跟踪表
UPDATE dwd_update_tracker
SET last_updated =DATE_SUB( now(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR )
WHERE table_name = 'dwd_task_pack';

COMMIT;

FROM

    type
)

SELECT
    go.tenant_id,
    go.machine_code,
    go.machine_name,
    go.actual_id,
    a.in_batch_code,
    go.batch_code,
    go.grade,
		go.weight,
		go.group_id,
    go.group_name,
    go.group_leader,
		'' AS last_group_id,
    '' AS last_group_name,
    '' AS last_group_leader,
    go.steel_grade,
    b.attr_value4 AS steel_grade_type,
    go.weight/1000*ifnull(d.ATTRIBUTE2, 0) AS lower_amount,
		b.defect_machine,
    case when a.first_trial_result = 1 then  '合格'  when a.first_trial_result = 2 then  '不合格'  end  first_trial_result ,
    go.data_date,
    date_format(go.data_date, '%Y-%m') AS MONTH,
		bb.attribute2 type
FROM
    dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output go
    JOIN dwd_task_prod_actual a ON go.actual_id = a.actual_id
    JOIN with_attr_value bb ON go.tenant_id = bb.tenant_id 
        AND go.machine_code = bb.attribute1 
        AND bb.scene = 'bi_sc_zl_009_machine'
    JOIN ods_mes_sys_attr_value b ON go.steel_grade = b.attr_value 
        AND b.attr_id = '1013' 
        AND b.`STATUS` = 1
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            a.actual_id,
            b.defect_machine 
        FROM
            ods_mes_mm_qc_actual_defect_rela a
            JOIN ods_mes_mm_qc_defect_data b ON a.defect_data_id = b.defect_data_id 
                AND b.`status` = 1 
                AND a.`status` = 1 
        WHERE
            a.is_main_defect = 1 
    ) b ON a.actual_id = b.actual_id
    LEFT JOIN with_attr_value d ON go.grade = d.ATTRIBUTE1 
        AND d.scene = 'bi_sc_zl_009_lower_amount'
WHERE
    go.data_date >= '2024-10-01' 

    ;

JOIN (
    SELECT
        a.tenant_id,
				go.group_id,
        go.group_name,
        go.group_leader,
        a.batch_code 
    FROM
        dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output go
        JOIN dwd_task_prod_actual a ON go.actual_id = a.actual_id 
) d ON d.tenant_id = t.tenant_id 
    AND d.batch_code = t.in_batch_code 
SET t.last_group_name = d.group_name,
    t.last_group_leader = d.group_leader,
    t.last_group_id = d.group_id;

    SUM(ifnull(b.lower_amount/10000,0)) AS lower_amount,0 off_line_downgrade_weight,1 rk,1 rk1

dolphin_task_hits.name: 报表-生产-质量-400系-自工序缺陷降级直接损失吨钢（ads_sc_zl_05）
dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
DELETE from  ads_sc_zl_05 ;
INSERT into ads_sc_zl_05

SELECT
    a.tenant_id,
    a.grade,
    a.steel_grade,
    SUM( case when grade in ('B','C','D') and b.defect_machine is not  null  and  b.defect_machine <>'01'   then  a.net_weight else 0 end  ) a_net_weight,
    SUM( case when grade in ('B','C','D') and b.defect_machine is null  and a.lower_reason='生产原因' then  a.net_weight else 0 end  ) b_net_weight,
    SUM( case when grade in ('B','C','D') and b.defect_machine is null  and (a.lower_reason=''  or a.lower_reason is null)  then  a.net_weight else 0 end  ) c_net_weight,

    SUM(   a.net_weight ) net_weight,
    ifnull(d.ATTRIBUTE2,0) lower_amount ,
    SUM( case when grade in ('B','C','D') and b.defect_machine is not  null   and  b.defect_machine <>'01'  then  a.net_weight else 0 end  ) +
    SUM( case when grade in ('B','C','D') and b.defect_machine is null  and a.lower_reason='生产原因' then  a.net_weight else 0 end  )+
    SUM( case when grade in ('B','C','D') and b.defect_machine is null  and (a.lower_reason=''  or a.lower_reason is null)  then  a.net_weight else 0 end  ) lower_net_weight,
    a.data_date,
    date_format( a.data_date, '%Y-%m' )  month
FROM
    dwd_task_prod_actual a
        JOIN with_attr_value bb ON a.tenant_id = bb.attribute32
        AND a.machine_code = bb.attribute1
        AND bb.scene = 'bi_sc_zl_004_machine'
        join with_attr_value dd  on dd.scene = 'BI-SC-ZL-005-STEEL-GRADE' and a.steel_grade=dd.ATTRIBUTE1  and  a.surface=dd.ATTRIBUTE2
        left JOIN ( SELECT distinct
                        a.actual_id, b.defect_machine
                    FROM
                        ods_mes_mm_qc_actual_defect_rela a   join ods_mes_mm_qc_defect_data b  on a.defect_data_id=b.defect_data_id AND b.`status` = 1 AND a.`status` = 1 where a.is_main_defect=1 ) b ON a.actual_id = b.actual_id
        left join with_attr_value d on a.grade=d.ATTRIBUTE1  and d.scene='bi_sc_zl_005_lower_amount'
where grade not in ('R','S')
GROUP BY
    a.tenant_id,
    a.steel_grade,
    a.grade,
    a.data_date,d.ATTRIBUTE2

dolphin_task_hits.name: 质量-生产质量报表（ads_sc_zl_13）
dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
DELETE
FROM
    ads_sc_zl_13_detail where data_date >=  CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 30 day ;
INSERT INTO ads_sc_zl_13_detail SELECT
                                               a.tenant_id,
                                               c.attribute1 machine_type,
                                               a.machine_code,
                                               b.attribute1 steel_grade_type,
                                               a.steel_grade,
                                               d.attribute2 surface_type,
                                               a.surface,
                                               a.inner_grade,
                                               a.grade,
                                               a.batch_code,
                                               a.weight,
                                               a.output_time,
                                               a.data_date,
                                               substr(a.data_date,1,7) month ,
                                               a.main_defect_code,
                                               a.main_defect_name
FROM
    dwd_task_prod_actual a
        JOIN with_attr_value c ON a.machine_code = c.attribute2
        AND c.scene = 'BI_SC_ZL_013_MACHINE_CODE'
        JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.steel_grade = b.attribute2
        AND c.attribute1 = b.attribute3
        AND b.scene = 'BI_SC_ZL_013_STEEL_GRADE'
        JOIN with_attr_value d ON c.attribute1 = d.attribute1
        AND a.surface = d.attribute3
        AND d.scene = 'BI_SC_ZL_013_SURFACE'
WHERE
    a.data_date >=  CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 30 day ;
DELETE
FROM
    ads_sc_zl_13;
INSERT INTO ads_sc_zl_13 SELECT
                                        a.tenant_id,
                                        c.attribute1 machine_code,
                                        b.attribute1 steel_grade,
                                        d.attribute2 surface,
                                        a.data_date,
                                        substr(data_date,1,7) month ,
                                        ROUND(SUM(a.weight) / 1000, 2) AS weight,
                                        ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.inner_grade = 'A1' THEN a.weight END) / 1000, 2) AS a1_weight,
                                        ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.inner_grade = 'A2' THEN a.weight END) / 1000, 2) AS a2_weight,
                                        ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.inner_grade = 'A3' THEN a.weight END) / 1000, 2) AS a3_weight,
                                        ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.inner_grade IN ('A1', 'A2', 'A3') THEN a.weight END) / 1000, 2) AS inner_grade_weight,
                                        ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'A' THEN a.weight END) / 1000, 2) AS a_weight,
                                        ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'B' THEN a.weight END) / 1000, 2) AS b_weight,
                                        ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'C' THEN a.weight END) / 1000, 2) AS c_weight,
                                        ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'D' THEN a.weight END) / 1000, 2) AS d_weight,
                                        ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'R' THEN a.weight END) / 1000, 2) AS r_weight,
                                        '日' period,
                                        now() sync_time,
                                        1 rk,
                                        1 rk1
FROM
    dwd_task_prod_actual a
        JOIN with_attr_value c ON a.machine_code = c.attribute2
        AND c.scene = 'BI_SC_ZL_013_MACHINE_CODE'
        JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.steel_grade = b.attribute2
        AND c.attribute1 = b.attribute3
        AND b.scene = 'BI_SC_ZL_013_STEEL_GRADE'
        JOIN with_attr_value d ON c.attribute1 = d.attribute1
        AND a.surface = d.attribute3
        AND d.scene = 'BI_SC_ZL_013_SURFACE'
WHERE
    a.data_date >= '2025-01-01'

dolphin_task_hits.name: 报表-生产-质量-湖南-涂层合格率（ads_sc_zl_12）
dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
-- 删除原表数据
DELETE FROM ads_sc_zl_12_detail;

-- 插入新的数据
INSERT INTO ads_sc_zl_12_detail

SELECT
    a.machine_code,
    max(DATE(a.output_time)) AS data_date,

    b.batch_code,

    IFNULL(b.layer_resistance, 0) AS layer_resistance,
    CASE
        WHEN b.layer_resistance >= 30 THEN '合格'
        WHEN b.layer_resistance <= 30 THEN '不合格'
        WHEN b.layer_resistance IS NULL THEN '无层间电阻数据'
        END AS layer_resistance_dsc,
    b.adhesion,
    CASE
        WHEN b.adhesion IN ('A', 'B', 'C') THEN '合格'
        WHEN b.adhesion IN ('D', 'E', 'F') THEN '不合格'
        WHEN b.layer_resistance IS NULL THEN '无涂层附着性数据'
        END AS adhesion_dsc
FROM
    ods_mes_mm_sisteel_performance b
        JOIN ods_mes_wms_batch_info bi ON b.batch_code = bi.batch_code
        AND bi.`status` = 1
        AND bi.steel_grade = 'QX'
        JOIN dwd_task_prod_actual a ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id
        AND a.machine_code IN ( 'FCL01','FCL02','FCL03' )
        AND bi.original_batch_code = SUBSTR( A.batch_code, 1, 10 )
WHERE
    b.STATUS = 1
  AND b.adhesion IS NOT NULL
  AND b.layer_resistance IS NOT NULL
  and date(b.created_time) >=CURRENT_DATE -INTERVAL 16 day and date(b.created_time) <=CURRENT_DATE
  and b.tenant_id = 92
GROUP BY
    b.batch_code ,
    b.adhesion,b.layer_resistance
;


DELETE FROM ads_sc_zl_12;

INSERT INTO ads_sc_zl_12
SELECT
    machine_code,
    data_date,
    COUNT(batch_code) AS total_batches,

    -- 层间电阻合格数量
    SUM(CASE WHEN layer_resistance_dsc = '合格' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS qualified_layer_resistance,

    -- 层间电阻的合格和不合格数量
    SUM(CASE WHEN layer_resistance_dsc IN ('合格', '不合格') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_layer_resistance,

    -- 层间电阻合格率（防止除零错误）
    CASE
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN layer_resistance_dsc IN ('合格', '不合格') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
            THEN SUM(CASE WHEN layer_resistance_dsc = '合格' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 /
                 SUM(CASE WHEN layer_resistance_dsc IN ('合格', '不合格') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
        ELSE 0
        END                                                                 AS layer_resistance_rate,

    -- 平均层间电阻
    AVG(layer_resistance)                                               AS avg_layer_resistance,

    -- 涂层附着性合格数量
    SUM(CASE WHEN adhesion_dsc = '合格' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)              AS qualified_adhesion,

    -- 涂层附着性的合格和不合格数量
    SUM(CASE WHEN adhesion_dsc IN ('合格', '不合格') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_adhesion,

    -- 涂层附着性合格率（防止除零错误）
    CASE
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN adhesion_dsc IN ('合格', '不合格') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
            THEN SUM(CASE WHEN adhesion_dsc = '合格' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 /
                 SUM(CASE WHEN adhesion_dsc IN ('合格', '不合格') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
        ELSE 0
        END                                                                 AS adhesion_rate,

    -- 层间电阻和涂层附着性同时合格率
    CASE
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN adhesion_dsc IN ('合格', '不合格') AND layer_resistance_dsc IN ('合格', '不合格') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
            THEN SUM(CASE WHEN adhesion_dsc = '合格' AND layer_resistance_dsc ='合格' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 /
                 SUM(CASE WHEN adhesion_dsc IN ('合格', '不合格') AND layer_resistance_dsc IN ('合格', '不合格') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
        ELSE 0
        END AS yield_rate ,

    -- 层间电阻合格数量（层间电阻 >= 15）
    CASE
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN adhesion_dsc IN ('合格', '不合格') AND layer_resistance_dsc IN ('合格', '不合格') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
            THEN SUM(CASE WHEN layer_resistance >= 15 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 /
                 SUM(CASE WHEN adhesion_dsc IN ('合格', '不合格') AND layer_resistance_dsc IN ('合格', '不合格') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
        ELSE 0
    END
     AS qualified_layer_resistance_15

FROM
    ads_sc_zl_12_detail

GROUP BY
    machine_code,
    data_date;

dolphin_task_hits.name: 0.2+0.23(GK080)对应原料库存情况（ads_sc_wk_17）
dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
DELETE
FROM ads_sc_wk_17;

INSERT INTO ads_sc_wk_17 (tenant_id, sku_name, thickness, weight, weight_below_28_5, pct_below_28_5, weight_at_or_above_28_5, pct_at_or_above_28_5, rk, sync_time)
WITH target_specs AS (
    SELECT '2.00' AS spec
    UNION ALL
    SELECT '2.30'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT '2.60'
),
     target_sku AS (
         SELECT 'HIB常化酸洗卷' AS sku_name
         UNION ALL
         SELECT 'HIB热轧卷'
     ),
     aggregated_data AS (
         SELECT
             a.tenant_id,
             case when a.sku_name in ('HIB热轧卷', 'HIB热轧卷(切边)')  then 'HIB热轧卷' else 'HIB常化酸洗卷' end  sku_name   ,
             SUBSTR(a.spec, 1, 4) AS spec,  -- 截取规格前四位
             COALESCE(SUM(a.weight) / 1000, 0) AS weight,
             COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN (b.als < 28.5 OR b.als IS NULL) THEN a.weight ELSE 0 END) / 1000, 0) AS weight_below_28_5,
             ROUND(
                     CASE
                         WHEN SUM(a.weight) = 0 THEN 0
                         ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN (b.als < 28.5 OR b.als IS NULL) THEN a.weight ELSE 0 END) / SUM(a.weight)
                         END,
                     4) AS pct_below_28_5,
             COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN b.als >= 28.5 THEN a.weight ELSE 0 END) / 1000, 0) AS weight_at_or_above_28_5,
             ROUND(
                     CASE
                         WHEN SUM(a.weight) = 0 THEN 0
                         ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN b.als >= 28.5 THEN a.weight ELSE 0 END) / SUM(a.weight)
                         END,
                     4) AS pct_at_or_above_28_5
         FROM
             `dwd_mes_wms_current_stock` a
                 join ods_mes_wms_batch_info bi on a.tenant_id = bi.tenant_id and bi.STATUS = 1  and  a.batch_code = bi.batch_code  and bi.producer= '涟钢'
                 LEFT JOIN ods_mes_mm_sus_element b
                           ON bi.in_batch_code = b.in_batch_code
                               AND b.STATUS = 1
                               AND a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id
         WHERE
           a.tenant_id = 92
           AND a.sku_name IN ('HIB热轧卷', 'HIB热轧卷(切边)', 'HIB常化酸洗卷')
         GROUP BY
             SUBSTR(a.spec, 1, 4),
             case when a.sku_name in ('HIB热轧卷', 'HIB热轧卷(切边)')  then 'HIB热轧卷' else 'HIB常化酸洗卷' end ,
             a.tenant_id
     )
SELECT
    92 tenant_id,
    target_sku.sku_name,
    ts.spec,
    ad.weight,
    ad.weight_below_28_5,
    ad.pct_below_28_5,
    ad.weight_at_or_above_28_5,
    ad.pct_at_or_above_28_5,
    1 ,
    now()
FROM
    target_specs ts
        LEFT JOIN target_sku ON 1 = 1
        LEFT JOIN aggregated_data ad ON ts.spec = ad.spec
        AND target_sku.sku_name = ad.sku_name;

INSERT INTO ads_sc_wk_17 (tenant_id, sku_name, thickness, weight, weight_below_28_5, pct_below_28_5, weight_at_or_above_28_5, pct_at_or_above_28_5, rk)
SELECT
    tenant_id,
    '总计' sku_name,
    thickness,
    SUM(weight) weight,
    SUM(weight_below_28_5) weight_below_28_5,
    CASE
        WHEN SUM(weight) = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE ROUND(SUM(weight_below_28_5) / SUM(weight), 4)
        END AS pct_below_28_5,
    SUM(weight_at_or_above_28_5) weight_at_or_above_28_5,
    CASE
        WHEN SUM(weight) = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE ROUND(SUM(weight_at_or_above_28_5) / SUM(weight), 4)
        END AS pct_at_or_above_28_5,
    3
FROM
    ads_sc_wk_17
GROUP BY
    tenant_id,
    thickness;

UPDATE ads_sc_wk_17 a
    JOIN (
        SELECT tenant_id, sku_name, SUM(weight) weight
        FROM ads_sc_wk_17
        WHERE thickness <> '总计'
        GROUP BY tenant_id, sku_name
    ) b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id
        AND a.sku_name = b.sku_name
SET a.total_weight = b.weight
WHERE thickness <> '总计';

UPDATE ads_sc_wk_17 a
    JOIN (
        SELECT
            tenant_id,
            sku_name,
            CASE
                WHEN SUM(weight) = 0 THEN 0
                ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN thickness IN ('2.00', '2.30') THEN weight_at_or_above_28_5 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(weight)
                END AS coincidence_ratio
        FROM
            ads_sc_wk_17
        WHERE thick

dolphin_task_hits.name: ads_sc_zl_07_02（报表-生产-质量-工序成材率-月报表）
dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
DELETE from  ads_sc_zl_07_02;
INSERT INTO ads_sc_zl_07_02 (
    tenant_id,
    machine_group,
    machine_code,
    steel_grade,
    machine_name,
    split_in_weight_current,
    net_weight_current,
    yield_rate_current,
    waste_rate_current,
    waste_t_weight_current,
    split_in_weight_last,
    net_weight_last,
    yield_rate_last,
    waste_rate_last,
    waste_t_weight_last,
    month,
    list_order
)
WITH current_month_data AS (
    SELECT
        a.tenant_id,
        a.machine_group,
        a.machine_code,
        steel_grade,
        machine_name,
        DATE_FORMAT(data_date, '%Y-%m') AS month,
        SUM(IFNULL(split_in_weight, 0))/1000 AS split_in_weight,
        SUM(IFNULL(net_weight, 0))/1000 AS net_weight,
        IF(SUM(IFNULL(split_in_weight, 0)) = 0, 0, SUM(IFNULL(net_weight, 0)) / SUM(IFNULL(split_in_weight, 0))) AS yield_rate,
        IF(SUM(IFNULL(split_in_weight, 0)) = 0, 0, 1 - (SUM(IFNULL(net_weight, 0)) / SUM(IFNULL(split_in_weight, 0)))) AS waste_rate,
        IFNULL(SUM(IFNULL(split_in_weight, 0)) - SUM(IFNULL(net_weight, 0)), 0)/1000 AS waste_t_weight,
        b.list_order
    FROM
        ads_material_yield_rate_detail a
            JOIN with_attr_value b
                 ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id
                     AND a.machine_code = b.attribute1
                     AND b.scene = 'BI-SC-ZL-007-RK'
    WHERE
        a.tenant_id = 92
    GROUP BY
        a.tenant_id,
        a.machine_group,
        a.machine_code,
        steel_grade,
        machine_name,
        DATE_FORMAT(data_date, '%Y-%m'),
        b.list_order
),
     last_month_data AS (
         SELECT
             a.tenant_id,
             a.machine_code,
             steel_grade,
             machine_name,
             DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(data_date, INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m') AS month, -- 上月数据关联本月
             SUM(IFNULL(split_in_weight, 0)/1000) AS split_in_weight_last,
             SUM(IFNULL(net_weight, 0)/1000) AS net_weight_last,
             IF(SUM(IFNULL(split_in_weight, 0)) = 0, 0, SUM(IFNULL(net_weight, 0)) / SUM(IFNULL(split_in_weight, 0))) AS yield_rate_last,
             IF(SUM(IFNULL(split_in_weight, 0)) = 0, 0, 1 - (SUM(IFNULL(net_weight, 0)) / SUM(IFNULL(split_in_weight, 0)))) AS waste_rate_last,
             IFNULL(SUM(IFNULL(split_in_weight, 0)) - SUM(IFNULL(net_weight, 0)), 0)/1000 AS waste_t_weight_last
         FROM
             ads_material_yield_rate_detail a
                 JOIN with_attr_value b
                      ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id
                          AND a.machine_code = b.attribute1
                          AND b.scene = 'BI-SC-ZL-007-RK'
         WHERE
             a.tenant_id = 92
         GROUP BY
             a.tenant_id,
             a.machine_code,
             steel_grade,
             machine_name,
             DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(data_date, INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m') -- 将上月数据映射到本月
     )
SELECT
    c.tenant_id,
    c.machine_group,
    c.machine_code,
    c.steel_grade,
    c.machine_name,
    c.split_in_weight AS split_in_weight_current,
    c.net_weight AS net_weight_current,
    c.yield_rate AS yield_rate_current,
    c.waste_rate AS waste_rate_current,
    c.waste_t_weight AS waste_t_weight_current,
    l.split_in_weight_last,
    l.net_weight_last,
    l.yield_rate_last,
    l.waste_rate_last,
    l.waste_t_weight_last,
    c.month,
    c.list_order
FROM
    current_month_data c
        LEFT JOIN last_month_data l
                  ON c.tenant_id = l.tenant_id
                      AND c.machine_code = l.machine_code
                      AND c.month = l.month
;

dolphin_task_hits.name: ads_sc_zl_07_01（报表-生产-质量-工序成材率-机台分组-月报表）
dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
DELETE
FROM
    ads_sc_zl_07_01;
INSERT INTO ads_sc_zl_07_01 (
    tenant_id,
    machine_group,
    steel_grade,
    split_in_weight_current,
    net_weight_current,
    yield_rate_current,
    waste_rate_current,
    waste_t_weight_current,
    split_in_weight_last,
    net_weight_last,
    yield_rate_last,
    waste_rate_last,
    waste_t_weight_last,
    MONTH,
    list_order
) WITH current_month_data AS (
    SELECT
        a.tenant_id,
        a.machine_group,
        steel_grade,
        DATE_FORMAT( data_date, '%Y-%m' ) AS MONTH,
        SUM(
                IFNULL( split_in_weight, 0 ))/ 1000 AS split_in_weight,
        SUM(
                IFNULL( net_weight, 0 ))/ 1000 AS net_weight,
        IF
        (
                SUM(
                        IFNULL( split_in_weight, 0 )) = 0,
                0,
                SUM(
                        IFNULL( net_weight, 0 )) / SUM(
                        IFNULL( split_in_weight, 0 ))) AS yield_rate,
        IF
        (
                SUM(
                        IFNULL( split_in_weight, 0 )) = 0,
                0,
                1 - (
                    SUM(
                            IFNULL( net_weight, 0 )) / SUM(
                            IFNULL( split_in_weight, 0 )))) AS waste_rate,
        IFNULL( SUM( IFNULL( split_in_weight, 0 )) - SUM( IFNULL( net_weight, 0 )), 0 )/ 1000 AS waste_t_weight,
        b.list_order
    FROM
        ads_material_yield_rate_detail a
            JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id
            AND a.machine_code = b.attribute1
            AND b.scene = 'BI-SC-ZL-007-RK'
            and a.steel_grade =  b.attribute3
    WHERE
        a.tenant_id = 92
    GROUP BY
        a.tenant_id,
        a.machine_group,
        steel_grade,
        DATE_FORMAT( data_date, '%Y-%m' ),
        b.list_order
) SELECT
      c.tenant_id,
      c.machine_group,
      c.steel_grade,
      c.split_in_weight AS split_in_weight_current,
      c.net_weight AS net_weight_current,
      c.yield_rate AS yield_rate_current,
      c.waste_rate AS waste_rate_current,
      c.waste_t_weight AS waste_t_weight_current,
      l.split_in_weight split_in_weight_last,
      l.net_weight net_weight_last,
      l.yield_rate yield_rate_last,
      l.waste_rate waste_rate_last,
      l.waste_t_weight waste_t_weight_last,
      c.MONTH,
      c.list_order
FROM
    current_month_data c
        LEFT JOIN current_month_data l ON c.tenant_id = l.tenant_id
        AND c.machine_group = l.machine_group
        AND c.MONTH = DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CONCAT(l.MONTH, '-01'), INTERVAL -1 MONTH), '%Y-%m')
        AND c.steel_grade = l.steel_grade;

        FROM
            with_result_confirm
        WHERE
            STATUS = '1'
          AND report_id = '237'

    ) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id
        AND target.period = source.data_date
        AND target.attribute1 = source.manuf_line_name
SET target.attribute24 = source.breakdown_frequency,
    target.attribute25 = source.planned_downtime,

            SUM( attribute12 ) OVER ( PARTITION BY tenant_id, attribute1, substr( attribute2, 1, 7 ) ORDER BY period ) AS unplanned_downtime
        FROM

        WHERE

    ) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id
        AND target.period = source.data_date
        AND target.attribute1 = source.manuf_line_name
SET target.attribute24 = source.breakdown_frequency,
    target.attribute25 = source.planned_downtime,

-- 2. 插入汇总后的“总计”记录
INSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined (
    tenant_id,
    plate_type,
    group_manuf_line_name,
    manuf_line_name,
    attr1,
    data_date,
    day_weight,
    day_quantity,
    day_average_thickness,
    day_lower_weight,
    day_lower_quantity,
    day_breakdown_frequency,
    day_planned_downtime,
    day_unplanned_downtime,
    day_manufacturing_finished_output_tons,
    day_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,
    day_manufacturing_finished_output_length,
    day_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,
    day_manufacturing_finished_product,
    day_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity,
    month_weight,
    month_quantity,
    month_average_thickness,
    month_lower_weight,
    month_lower_quantity,
    month_breakdown_frequency,
    month_planned_downtime,
    month_unplanned_downtime,
    month_manufacturing_finished_output_tons,
    month_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,
    month_manufacturing_finished_output_length,
    month_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,
    month_manufacturing_finished_product,
    month_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity,
    MONTH,
    YEAR,
    rk,
    rk1
)
SELECT
    a.tenant_id,
    a.plate_type,
    '' AS group_manuf_line_name,
    '总计' AS manuf_line_name,
    '' AS attr1,
    a.data_date,
    SUM(a.day_weight) AS day_weight,
    SUM(a.day_quantity) AS day_quantity,
    AVG(a.day_average_thickness) AS day_average_thickness,
    SUM(a.day_lower_weight) AS day_lower_weight,
    SUM(a.day_lower_quantity) AS day_lower_quantity,
    SUM(a.day_breakdown_frequency) AS day_breakdown_frequency,
    SUM(a.day_planned_downtime) AS day_planned_downtime,
    SUM(a.day_unplanned_downtime) AS day_unplanned_downtime,
    SUM(a.day_manufacturing_finished_output_tons) AS day_manufacturing_finished_output_tons,
    SUM(a.day_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity) AS day_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,
    SUM(a.day_manufacturing_finished_output_length) AS day_manufacturing_finished_output_length,
    SUM(a.day_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length) AS day_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,
    SUM(a.day_manufacturing_finished_product) AS day_manufacturing_finished_product,
    SUM(a.day_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity) AS day_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity,
    SUM(a.month_weight) AS month_weight,
    SUM(a.month_quantity) AS month_quantity,
    AVG(a.month_average_thickness) AS month_average_thickness,
    SUM(a.month_lower_weight) AS month_lower_weight,
    SUM(a.month_lower_quantity) AS month_lower_quantity,
    SUM(a.month_breakdown_frequency) AS month_breakdown_frequency,
    SUM(a.month_planned_downtime) AS month_planned_downtime,
    SUM(a.month_unplanned_downtime) AS month_unplanned_downtime,
    SUM(a.month_manufacturing_finished_output_tons) AS month_manufacturing_finished_output_tons,
    SUM(a.month_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity) AS month_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,
    SUM(a.month_manufacturing_finished_output_length) AS month_manufacturing_finished_output_length,
    SUM(a.month_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length) AS month_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,
    SUM(a.month_manufacturing_finished_product) AS month_manufacturing_finished_product,
    SUM(a.month_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity) AS month_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity,
    a.MONTH,
    a.YEAR,
    99 AS rk,
    1  AS rk1
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            tenant_id,
            plate_type,
            group_manuf_line_name,
            manuf_line_name,
            data_date,
            MONTH,
            YEAR,
            -- 计算分组内 attr1 的值：存在合计行则返回 '合计'，否则取分组内任一值
            CASE
                WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN attr1 = '合计' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
                    THEN '合计'
                ELSE MIN(attr1)
                END AS attr1,

dolphin_task_hits.name: ADS_SC_ZL_11_DETAIL
dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
DELETE
FROM
    ads_SC_ZL_11_DETAIL   ;

INSERT INTO ads_SC_ZL_11_DETAIL (
    tenant_id, machine_code, original_batch_code, batch_code, type,
    surface, surface_thickness, surface_number, surface_middle_part,
    enter_date, data_date, weight
)
SELECT
    a.tenant_id,
    b.machine_code,
    a.original_batch_code,
    a.batch_code,
    av1.attribute3 AS type,
    a.surface,
    a.surface_thickness,
    a.surface_number,
    a.surface_middle_part,

    date(max(b.output_time)) data_date,

FROM
    dwd_mes_wms_wh_enter_item a
        JOIN ods_mes_wms_batch_info c ON a.original_batch_code = c.original_batch_code
        AND c.STATUS = 1
        JOIN dwd_task_prod_actual b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id
        AND b.STATUS = 1
        AND c.batch_code = b.batch_code
        AND b.grade <> 'R'
        JOIN with_attr_value av1 ON a.tenant_id = av1.tenant_id
        AND av1.scene = 'BI-SC-ZL-011-TYPE'
        AND av1.`status` = 1

WHERE

  and a.wh_code in ('3001','3002')

GROUP BY

dolphin_task_hits.name: 牌号推移（ads_sc_zl_11）
dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
DELETE
FROM
    ads_sc_zl_11;
INSERT INTO ads_sc_zl_11
WITH total_weight AS (
    SELECT
        tenant_id,
        surface_thickness,
        data_date,
        machine_code,
        type,
        SUM(weight/1000) AS total_weight
    FROM
        ads_sc_zl_11_detail
    GROUP BY
        tenant_id,
        surface_thickness,
        data_date,
        machine_code,
        type
),
     total_weight_zhongliang AS (
         SELECT
             tenant_id,
             surface_thickness,
             data_date,
             machine_code,
             SUM(weight/1000) AS zhongliang_weight
         FROM
             ads_sc_zl_11_detail
         WHERE
             type = '重量'
         GROUP BY
             tenant_id,
             surface_thickness,
             data_date,
             machine_code
     ),
     valid_combinations AS (
         -- 获取那些 '重量' 不为 0 的组合
         SELECT
             tenant_id,
             surface_thickness,
             data_date,
             machine_code
         FROM
             total_weight_zhongliang
         WHERE
             zhongliang_weight > 20
     ),
     all_dimensions AS (
         -- 仅保留有效组合
         SELECT
             di.data_date,
             av.tenant_id,
             av.attribute1 AS machine_code,
             av.attribute2 AS surface_thickness,
             av.attribute3 AS type
         FROM
             with_attr_value av
                 LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT data_date FROM total_weight) di ON 1 = 1
                 JOIN valid_combinations vc ON av.tenant_id = vc.tenant_id
                 AND av.attribute1 = vc.machine_code
                 AND av.attribute2 = vc.surface_thickness
                 AND di.data_date = vc.data_date
         WHERE
             av.STATUS = 1
           AND av.scene = 'BI-SC-ZL-011-TYPE'
         GROUP BY
             di.data_date,
             av.tenant_id,
             av.attribute1,
             av.attribute2,
             av.attribute3
     ),
     detail AS (
         -- 仅保留有效组合的明细
         SELECT
             d.data_date,
             d.tenant_id,
             d.machine_code,
             d.surface_thickness,
             d.type,
             SUM(d.weight/1000) AS weight
         FROM
             ads_sc_zl_11_detail d
                 JOIN valid_combinations vc ON d.tenant_id = vc.tenant_id
                 AND d.surface_thickness = vc.surface_thickness
                 AND d.data_date = vc.data_date
                 AND d.machine_code = vc.machine_code
         GROUP BY
             d.data_date,
             d.tenant_id,
             d.machine_code,
             d.surface_thickness,
             d.type
     )

SELECT
    ad.tenant_id,
    ad.surface_thickness,
    ad.data_date,
    ad.machine_code,
    ad.type AS index_name,
    CASE
        WHEN ad.type = '重量' THEN
            COALESCE(SUM(d.weight), 0)  -- 如果是 '重量' 类型，直接返回 sum(weight)
        ELSE
            concat(COALESCE(round(SUM(d.weight) / NULLIF(MAX(twz.zhongliang_weight),0) * 100, 0), 0),'%')  -- 其他类型按照 '重量' 类型的总重量计算百分比
        END AS index_value,
    NOW() AS sync_time
FROM
    all_dimensions ad
        LEFT JOIN detail d ON ad.tenant_id = d.tenant_id
        AND ad.surface_thickness = d.surface_thickness
        AND ad.data_date = d.data_date
        AND ad.machine_code = d.machine_code
        AND ad.type = d.type
        LEFT JOIN total_weight_zhongliang twz ON ad.tenant_id = twz.tenant_id
        AND ad.surface_thickness = twz.surface_thickness
        AND ad.data_date = twz.data_date
        AND ad.machine_code = twz.machine_code
GROUP BY
    ad.tenant_id,
    ad.surface_thickness,
    ad.data_date,
    ad.machine_code,
    ad.type;

FROM with_attr_value

INSERT INTO with_attr_value (tenant_id, scene, ATTRIBUTE1, ATTRIBUTE2, ATTRIBUTE3, ATTRIBUTE5, ATTRIBUTE6, ATTRIBUTE7,
                             ATTRIBUTE8)
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT sc.tenant_id,
             'bi_gx_xs_009_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL' scene,
             sc.contract_code,
             scd.prod_spec2                    surface,
             scd.prod_spec4                    grade,
             sc.contract_month,
             round(SUM(CASE
                           WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.weight / 1000
                           WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.weight
                           ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  total_contract_weight,
             round(SUM(CASE
                           WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_allocated / 1000
                           WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_allocated
                           ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  quantity_dj,
             round(SUM(CASE
                           WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped / 1000
                           WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped
                           ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  quantity_sy
      FROM ods_crm_sa_contract sc
               JOIN ods_crm_sa_contract_detail scd ON sc.contract_code = scd.contract_code
          AND scd.contract_detail_state in (30, 50) AND scd.STATUS = 1  and scd.quantity_unshipped > 0
               JOIN dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info a
                    ON scd.prod_spec2 = a.surface and a.silicon_steel_product_category_code = 'WQX'

      WHERE sc.contract_state in (30, 50)
        AND sc.contract_type <> '40'
        AND substr(sc.contract_month, 1, 4) >= 2024
        AND sc.STATUS = 1

      GROUP BY sc.tenant_id,
               sc.contract_code,
               scd.prod_spec2,
               scd.prod_spec4,
               sc.contract_month) a
;

DELETE
FROM ads_gx_xs_22
where sync_data_date = current_date
  and hour = hour(now())
;
INSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_22 (sync_data_date, HOUR, tenant_id, surface, a_quantity, b_quantity, total_quantity, rk, rk1,
                          sync_time, is_newest)
SELECT aa.sync_data_date,
       a.HOUR,
       aa.tenant_id,
       aa.surface,
       SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'a' THEN a.quantity END)         a_quantity,
       SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'b' THEN a.quantity END)         b_quantity,
       SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade IN ('a', 'b') THEN a.quantity END) total_quantity,
       1                                                        rk,
       1                                                        rk1,
       a.sync_time,
       a.is_newest
FROM (SELECT DISTINCT CURRENT_DATE
                          sync_data_date,
                      a.tenant_id,
                      a.surface
      FROM ads_gx_xs_22_detail a
               JOIN dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info c ON a.surface = c.surface
          AND c.silicon_steel_product_category_code = 'WQX'
      WHERE a.tenant_id = 92

        AND a.HOUR = 18
        AND a.sync_data_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 60 DAY
      UNION
      SELECT DISTINCT CURRENT_DATE,
                      tenant_id,
                      attribute2
      FROM with_attr_value
      WHERE scene = 'bi_gx_xs_009_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL') aa
         LEFT JOIN ads_gx_xs_22_detail a ON aa.surface = a.surface
    AND a.tenant_id = aa.tenant_id
    AND a.sync_data_date = aa.sync_data_date
    AND a.HOUR = 18
GROUP BY aa.sync_data_date,
         a.HOUR,
         aa.tenant_id,
         aa.surface,
         a.sync_time,
         a.is_newest
UNION ALL
SELECT sync_data_date,
       HOUR,
       tenant_id,
       '总计' AS                                                   surface,
       SUM(CASE WHEN grade = 'a' THEN quantity ELSE 0 END)         a_quantity,
       SUM(CASE WHEN grade = 'b' THEN quantity ELSE 0 END)         b_quantity,
       SUM(CASE WHEN grade IN ('a', 'b') THEN quantity ELSE 0 END) total

dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
DELETE from   ads_sc_xl_13_defined_detail WHERE data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 35 DAY); ;
INSERT into   ads_sc_xl_13_defined_detail
SELECT
    a.tenant_id,
    av1.attribute5 plate_type,
    av.attribute1 manuf_line_name,
    a.machine_code,
    a.data_date,
    a.batch_code,
    a.grade,
    a.sku_name,
    a.spec,
    sum(a.quantity) quantity,
    sum(a.roll_length) roll_length ,
    sum( a.weight )/ 1000 weight
FROM
    dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output a
        JOIN ods_mes_mm_task_prod_actual c ON a.actual_id = c.actual_id
        AND c.`status` = 1
        LEFT JOIN ods_mes_wms_batch_info b ON a.batch_code = b.batch_code
        AND a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id
        AND b.`status` = 1
        AND c.steel_grade = b.steel_grade
        AND c.spec = b.spec
        AND c.surface = b.surface
        AND c.grade = b.grade
        AND c.sku_code = b.sku_code

        JOIN with_attr_value av ON a.tenant_id = av.tenant_id
        AND a.machine_code = av.attribute2
        AND av.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-013-DEFINED-TYPE-LZ'
        JOIN with_attr_value av1 ON av.tenant_id = av1.tenant_id
        AND av.attribute1 = av1.attribute4
        AND av1.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-013-DEFINED-PLATE-LZ'
        AND av1.attribute5 IS NOT NULL
WHERE data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 35 DAY)  and a.batch_code is not null  and a.batch_code <> '' and a.is_ignore =  0 and a.send_happened= 1
GROUP BY
    av1.attribute5 ,a.sku_name,a.tenant_id,a.machine_code,a.spec,
    av.attribute1 ,
    a.data_date,
    a.batch_code,
    a.grade;

dolphin_task_hits.name: ads_sc_xl_09_process1
dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
DELETE
from ads_sc_xl_09_process1
where data_date = CURRENT_DATE;
INSERT into ads_sc_xl_09_process1

WITH tmp_batch_exclude AS (SELECT parent_batch_code
                           FROM ods_mes_wms_batch_info
                           WHERE parent_batch_code IS NOT NULL
                             AND batch_code <> parent_batch_code
                             AND status = 1
                           GROUP BY parent_batch_code),
     tmp_ads_sc_xl_09_process1 AS (
         -- 分支 1：全为通配 *
         SELECT a.ATTRIBUTE2 AS type,
                cs.tenant_id,
                cs.quantity,
                cs.ava_quantity,
                cs.status,
                cs.batch_code
         FROM with_attr_value a
                  JOIN ods_mes_wms_current_stock cs FORCE INDEX (idx_cs_tenant_wh_grade_sku_status_qty)
                       ON a.tenant_id = cs.tenant_id
                  LEFT JOIN tmp_batch_exclude f ON cs.batch_code = f.parent_batch_code
         WHERE a.scene = 'BI_SC_XL_009_WH'
           AND a.ATTRIBUTE1 = '*'
           AND a.ATTRIBUTE3 = '*'
           AND a.ATTRIBUTE4 = '*'
           AND (cs.quantity > 0 OR cs.ava_quantity > 0)
           AND cs.status = 1
           AND f.parent_batch_code IS NULL

         UNION ALL

         -- 分支 2：按实际值匹配
         SELECT a.ATTRIBUTE2 AS type,
                cs.tenant_id,
                cs.quantity,
                cs.ava_quantity,
                cs.status,
                cs.batch_code
         FROM with_attr_value a
                  JOIN ods_mes_wms_current_stock cs FORCE INDEX (idx_cs_tenant_wh_grade_sku_status_qty)
                       ON a.tenant_id = cs.tenant_id
                           AND cs.wh_code = a.ATTRIBUTE1
                           AND cs.steel_grade = a.ATTRIBUTE3
                           AND cs.sku_code = a.ATTRIBUTE4
                  LEFT JOIN tmp_batch_exclude f ON cs.batch_code = f.parent_batch_code
         WHERE a.scene = 'BI_SC_XL_009_WH'
           AND a.ATTRIBUTE1 != '*'
           AND a.ATTRIBUTE3 != '*'
           AND a.ATTRIBUTE4 != '*'
           AND (cs.quantity > 0 OR cs.ava_quantity > 0)
           AND cs.status = 1
           AND f.parent_batch_code IS NULL)

SELECT type,
       tenant_id,
       CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 1 DAY AS data_date,
       SUM(quantity) / 1000          AS quantity
FROM tmp_ads_sc_xl_09_process1
GROUP BY tenant_id, type;

dolphin_task_hits.name: 质量处置超时（ads_sc_wk_06）
dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
DELETE
FROM
    ads_sc_wk_06 where  data_date = CURRENT_DATE ;
INSERT INTO ads_sc_wk_06
 SELECT
    mm_quality_disposal.tenant_id,
    mm_order_item.order_item_code,
    mm_order_item.batch_code,
    mm_task_prod_actual.quantity,
    mm_quality_disposal.machine_code,
    mm_task_prod_actual.first_trial_time,
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(
            MINUTE,
            mm_task_prod_actual.first_trial_time,
            now()) AS minutes_difference,
    CASE

        WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(
                     MINUTE,
                     mm_task_prod_actual.first_trial_time,
                     now()) >= 1440 THEN
            1 ELSE 0
        END is_time_out,
    mm_task_prod_actual.is_pack ,
    CURRENT_DATE data_date,
    date_format( mm_task_prod_actual.first_trial_time, '%Y-%m' ) date_ym,
    now() sync_time
FROM
    ods_mes_mm_quality_disposal AS mm_quality_disposal
        INNER JOIN ods_mes_mm_order_item_task mm_order_item_task ON mm_order_item_task.task_inst_id = mm_quality_disposal.task_inst_id
        AND mm_order_item_task.STATUS = 1
        INNER JOIN ods_mes_mm_order_item mm_order_item ON mm_order_item.order_item_id = mm_quality_disposal.order_item_id
        AND mm_order_item.STATUS = 1
        INNER JOIN ods_mes_mm_task_prod_actual mm_task_prod_actual ON mm_task_prod_actual.actual_id = mm_quality_disposal.actual_id
        AND mm_task_prod_actual.`status` = 1
WHERE
    (
        mm_quality_disposal.STATUS = 1
            AND (
            mm_quality_disposal.disposal_status IN ( '00', '20' ))
        );

dolphin_task_hits.name: bi_sc_zl_002
dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
UPDATE dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_zl_001 AS target
INNER JOIN (
SELECT
	attribute1 steel_grade, 
	attribute2 surface, 
	attribute3 min_hv, 
	attribute4 max_hv
FROM
	with_attr_value
WHERE
	scene = 'BI-SC-ZL-002-HV') AS source
ON target.steel_grade = source.steel_grade
    AND target.surface = source.surface

SET
    target.min_hv = source.min_hv,target.max_hv = source.max_hv ;
		

        CREATE table dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_zl_002 as 
SELECT
	tenant_id,
	sum( CASE WHEN hardness BETWEEN min_hv AND max_hv THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) qualified_quantity,
	count( 1 ) quantity,
	sum( CASE WHEN hardness BETWEEN min_hv AND max_hv THEN 1 ELSE 0 END )/ count( 1 ) yield,
MONTH 
FROM
	dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_zl_001 
WHERE
	hardness IS NOT NULL 
GROUP BY
	tenant_id,
	MONTH;

dolphin_task_hits.name: bi_sc_zl_003
dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
DELETE from  dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_zl_003 ;
INSERT into dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_zl_003
SELECT
	a.tenant_id,
	a.grade,
	a.steel_grade,
  SUM( case when grade in ('B','C','D') and b.defect_machine is not  null  and  b.defect_machine <>'01' then  a.net_weight else 0 end  ) a_net_weight,
	SUM( case when grade in ('B','C','D') and b.defect_machine is null  and a.lower_reason='生产原因' then  a.net_weight else 0 end  ) b_net_weight,
	SUM( case when grade in ('B','C','D') and b.defect_machine is null  and (a.lower_reason=''  or a.lower_reason is null)  then  a.net_weight else 0 end  ) c_net_weight,
		SUM( case when inner_grade ='A3' and grade='A'  then  a.net_weight else 0 end  ) d_net_weight,
		SUM(   a.net_weight ) net_weight,
		ifnull(d.ATTRIBUTE3,0) lower_amount ,
		 SUM( case when grade in ('B','C','D') and b.defect_machine is not  null  and  b.defect_machine <>'01' then  a.net_weight else 0 end  ) +
		SUM( case when grade in ('B','C','D') and b.defect_machine is null  and a.lower_reason='生产原因' then  a.net_weight else 0 end  )+
		SUM( case when grade in ('B','C','D') and b.defect_machine is null  and (a.lower_reason=''  or a.lower_reason is null)  then  a.net_weight else 0 end  )+SUM( case when inner_grade ='A3' and grade='A'  then  a.net_weight else 0 end  ) lower_net_weight,
	  a.data_date,
		date_format( a.data_date, '%Y-%m' )  month
FROM
	dw_ads_prd.dwd_task_prod_actual a
	join (select distinct  attribute32 tenant_id,attribute1 machine_code,attribute2 type from  dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value  where scene = 'bi-sc-zl-001') dd on a.tenant_id=dd.tenant_id and a.machine_code=dd.machine_code
left JOIN ( SELECT distinct
	a.actual_id, b.defect_machine
FROM
	dw_ods_prd.ods_mes_hmes_mm_qc_actual_defect_rela a   join dw_ods_prd.ods_mes_hmes_mm_qc_defect_data b  on a.defect_data_id=b.defect_data_id AND b.`status` = 1 AND a.`status` = 1 where a.is_main_defect=1 ) b ON a.actual_id = b.actual_id 
  left join dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value d on a.steel_grade=d.ATTRIBUTE1 and a.grade=d.ATTRIBUTE2 and d.scene='bi_sc_zl_003_lower_amount'
	where grade not in ('R','S')  and data_date is not null 
GROUP BY
	a.tenant_id,
		a.steel_grade,
a.grade,
	a.data_date,d.ATTRIBUTE3

dolphin_task_hits.name: bi_sc_zl_004
dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
DELETE from  dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_zl_004 ;
INSERT into  dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_zl_004
SELECT
	a.tenant_id,
	a.batch_code,
	a.machine_code,
	a.machine_name,
	a.sku_code,
	a.sku_name,
	a.steel_grade,
	a.surface,
	a.grade,
	a.net_weight ,
	a.data_date ,
	date_format( a.data_date, '%Y-%m' ) month
	
FROM
	dw_ads_prd.dwd_task_prod_actual a
	JOIN dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value b ON a.tenant_id = b.attribute32 
	AND a.machine_code = b.attribute1 
	AND b.scene = 'bi_sc_zl_004_machine' 
	JOIN dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value c ON  a.steel_grade = c.attribute1 
	AND c.scene = 'bi_sc_zl_004_steel_grade' 
	JOIN dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value d ON a.surface = d.attribute1 
	AND d.scene = 'bi_sc_zl_004_surface' 
	where a.grade not in ('R','S') ;

	a.steel_grade,
  SUM( case when grade in ('B','C','D') and b.defect_machine is not  null  and  b.defect_machine <>'01'   then  a.net_weight else 0 end  ) a_net_weight,
	SUM( case when grade in ('B','C','D') and b.defect_machine is null  and a.lower_reason='生产原因' then  a.net_weight else 0 end  ) b_net_weight,
	SUM( case when grade in ('B','C','D') and b.defect_machine is null  and (a.lower_reason=''  or a.lower_reason is null)  then  a.net_weight else 0 end  ) c_net_weight,
		
		SUM(   a.net_weight ) net_weight,
		ifnull(d.ATTRIBUTE2,0) lower_amount ,
		 SUM( case when grade in ('B','C','D') and b.defect_machine is not  null   and  b.defect_machine <>'01'  then  a.net_weight else 0 end  ) +
		SUM( case when grade in ('B','C','D') and b.defect_machine is null  and a.lower_reason='生产原因' then  a.net_weight else 0 end  )+
		SUM( case when grade in ('B','C','D') and b.defect_machine is null  and (a.lower_reason=''  or a.lower_reason is null)  then  a.net_weight else 0 end  ) lower_net_weight,
	  a.data_date,
		date_format( a.data_date, '%Y-%m' )  month
FROM
	dw_ads_prd.dwd_task_prod_actual a
	JOIN dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value bb ON a.tenant_id = bb.attribute32 
	AND a.machine_code = bb.attribute1 
	AND bb.scene = 'bi_sc_zl_004_machine' 
	join dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value dd  on dd.scene = 'BI-SC-ZL-005-STEEL-GRADE' and a.steel_grade=dd.ATTRIBUTE1  and  a.surface=dd.ATTRIBUTE2
left JOIN ( SELECT distinct
	a.actual_id, b.defect_machine
FROM
	dw_ods_prd.ods_mes_hmes_mm_qc_actual_defect_rela a   join dw_ods_prd.ods_mes_hmes_mm_qc_defect_data b  on a.defect_data_id=b.defect_data_id AND b.`status` = 1 AND a.`status` = 1 where a.is_main_defect=1 ) b ON a.actual_id = b.actual_id 
  left join dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value d on a.grade=d.ATTRIBUTE1  and d.scene='bi_sc_zl_005_lower_amount'
	where grade not in ('R','S') 
GROUP BY
	a.tenant_id,
		a.steel_grade,
a.grade,
	a.data_date,d.ATTRIBUTE2

    type
)
SELECT
    go.tenant_id,
    go.machine_code,
    go.machine_name,
    go.actual_id,
    a.in_batch_code,
    go.batch_code,
    go.grade,
		go.weight,
		go.group_id,
    go.group_name,
    go.group_leader,
		'' AS last_group_id,
    '' AS last_group_name,
    '' AS last_group_leader,
    go.steel_grade,
    b.attr_value4 AS steel_grade_type,
    go.weight/1000*ifnull(d.ATTRIBUTE2, 0) AS lower_amount,
		a.main_defect_name,
		a.main_defect_desc,
			a.main_defect_machine,
    case when a.first_trial_result = 1 then  '合格'  when a.first_trial_result = 2 then  '不合格'  end  first_trial_result ,
    go.data_date,
    date_format(go.data_date, '%Y-%m') AS MONTH,
		bb.attribute2 type
FROM
    dw_ads_prd.dwd_mes_hmes_mm_task_group_output go
    JOIN dw_ads_prd.dwd_task_prod_actual a ON go.actual_id = a.actual_id
    JOIN dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value bb ON go.tenant_id = bb.tenant_id 
        AND go.machine_code = bb.attribute1 
        AND bb.scene = 'bi_sc_zl_008_machine'
    JOIN dw_ods_prd.ods_mes_hmes_sys_attr_value b ON go.steel_grade = b.attr_value 
        AND b.attr_id = '1013' 
        AND b.`STATUS` = 1
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            a.actual_id,
            b.defect_machine 
        FROM
            dw_ods_prd.ods_mes_hmes_mm_qc_actual_defect_rela a
            JOIN dw_ods_prd.ods_mes_hmes_mm_qc_defect_data b ON a.defect_data_id = b.defect_data_id 
                AND b.`status` = 1 
                AND a.`status` = 1 
        WHERE
            a.is_main_defect = 1 
    ) b ON a.actual_id = b.actual_id
    LEFT JOIN dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value d ON go.grade = d.ATTRIBUTE1 
        AND d.scene = 'bi_sc_zl_008_lower_amount'
WHERE
    go.data_date >= '2024-10-01' 

    ; 

UPDATE dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_zl_008_detail t
JOIN (
    SELECT
        a.tenant_id,
				go.group_id,
        go.group_name,
        go.group_leader,
        a.batch_code 
    FROM
        dw_ads_prd.dwd_mes_hmes_mm_task_group_output go
        JOIN dw_ads_prd.dwd_task_prod_actual a ON go.actual_id = a.actual_id 
) d ON d.tenant_id = t.tenant_id 
    AND d.batch_code = t.in_batch_code 
SET t.last_group_name = d.group_name,
    t.last_group_leader = d.group_leader,
    t.last_group_id = d.group_id;

dolphin_task_hits.name: BI_SC_ZL_012
dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
-- 删除原表数据
DELETE FROM dw_ads_prd.BI_SC_ZL_012_DETAIL;

-- 插入新的数据
INSERT INTO dw_ads_prd.BI_SC_ZL_012_DETAIL

SELECT 
    a.machine_code,
    max(DATE(a.output_time)) AS data_date,

    b.batch_code,

    IFNULL(b.layer_resistance, 0) AS layer_resistance,
    CASE
        WHEN b.layer_resistance >= 30 THEN '合格'
        WHEN b.layer_resistance <= 30 THEN '不合格'
        WHEN b.layer_resistance IS NULL THEN '无层间电阻数据'
    END AS layer_resistance_dsc,
    b.adhesion,
    CASE
        WHEN b.adhesion IN ('A', 'B', 'C') THEN '合格'
        WHEN b.adhesion IN ('D', 'E', 'F') THEN '不合格'
        WHEN b.layer_resistance IS NULL THEN '无涂层附着性数据'
    END AS adhesion_dsc
FROM
	dw_ods_prd.ods_mes_mm_sisteel_performance b
	JOIN dw_ods_prd.ods_mes_hmes_wms_batch_info bi ON b.batch_code = bi.batch_code 
	AND bi.`status` = 1 
	AND bi.steel_grade = 'QX'
	JOIN dw_ads_prd.dwd_task_prod_actual a ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id
	AND a.machine_code IN ( 'FCL01','FCL02','FCL03' ) 
	AND bi.original_batch_code = SUBSTR( A.batch_code, 1, 10 ) 
WHERE
	b.STATUS = 1 
	AND b.adhesion IS NOT NULL 
	AND b.layer_resistance IS NOT NULL 
	and date(b.created_time) >=CURRENT_DATE -INTERVAL 16 day and date(b.created_time) <=CURRENT_DATE
  and b.tenant_id = 92 
GROUP BY
	b.batch_code ,
	b.adhesion,b.layer_resistance 
	;
		
		
		DELETE FROM dw_ads_prd.BI_SC_ZL_012;

INSERT INTO dw_ads_prd.BI_SC_ZL_012 
SELECT
    machine_code,
    data_date,
    COUNT(batch_code) AS total_batches,
    
    -- 层间电阻合格数量
    SUM(CASE WHEN layer_resistance_dsc = '合格' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS qualified_layer_resistance,
    
    -- 层间电阻的合格和不合格数量
    SUM(CASE WHEN layer_resistance_dsc IN ('合格', '不合格') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_layer_resistance,
    
    -- 层间电阻合格率（防止除零错误）
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN layer_resistance_dsc IN ('合格', '不合格') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
        THEN SUM(CASE WHEN layer_resistance_dsc = '合格' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / 
             SUM(CASE WHEN layer_resistance_dsc IN ('合格', '不合格') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
        ELSE 0
    END AS layer_resistance_rate,
    
    -- 平均层间电阻
    AVG(layer_resistance) AS avg_layer_resistance,

    -- 涂层附着性合格数量
    SUM(CASE WHEN adhesion_dsc = '合格' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS qualified_adhesion,
    
    -- 涂层附着性的合格和不合格数量
    SUM(CASE WHEN adhesion_dsc IN ('合格', '不合格') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_adhesion,
    
    -- 涂层附着性合格率（防止除零错误）
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN adhesion_dsc IN ('合格', '不合格') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
        THEN SUM(CASE WHEN adhesion_dsc = '合格' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / 
             SUM(CASE WHEN adhesion_dsc IN ('合格', '不合格') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
        ELSE 0
    END AS adhesion_rate,

    -- 层间电阻和涂层附着性同时合格率
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN adhesion_dsc IN ('合格', '不合格') AND layer_resistance_dsc IN ('合格', '不合格') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
        THEN SUM(CASE WHEN adhesion_dsc = '合格' AND layer_resistance_dsc ='合格' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / 
             SUM(CASE WHEN adhesion_dsc IN ('合格', '不合格') AND layer_resistance_dsc IN ('合格', '不合格') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
        ELSE 0
    END AS yield_rate ,

    -- 层间电阻合格数量（层间电阻 >= 15）
		 CASE 
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN adhesion_dsc IN ('合格', '不合格') AND layer_resistance_dsc IN ('合格', '不合格') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
        THEN SUM(CASE WHEN layer_resistance >= 15 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / 
             SUM(CASE WHEN adhesion_dsc IN ('合格', '不合格') AND layer_resistance_dsc IN ('合格', '不合格') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
        ELSE 0
    END
     AS qualified_layer_resistance_15

FROM
    dw_ads_prd.BI_SC_ZL_012_DETAIL

GROUP BY
    machine_code,
    data_date;

UPDATE dw_ads_prd.dwd_mes_hmes_wms_wh_enter_item AS target
INNER JOIN ( SELECT tenant_id, attribute1 wh_code, attribute2 dept_code, attribute3 process_name FROM dw_ads_prd.`with_attr_value` WHERE scene = 'BI-SC-WK-004' ) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id 
AND target.wh_code = source.wh_code 
AND
CASE
		
		WHEN source.dept_code = '*' THEN
		1 = 1 ELSE target.dept_code = source.dept_code 
END 
	SET target.process_name = source.process_name;
	
	
	
DELETE 
FROM
	dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_wk_004;
INSERT INTO dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_wk_004 SELECT
tenant_id,
process_name,
sum( quantity ) quantity,
data_date,
'D' period 
FROM
	dw_ads_prd.dwd_mes_hmes_wms_wh_enter_item 
WHERE
	process_name IS NOT NULL  and en_status='1' and ei_status='1'
GROUP BY
	tenant_id,
	process_name,
	data_date UNION ALL
SELECT
	tenant_id,
	process_name,
	SUM( amount ) OVER ( PARTITION BY tenant_id, process_name, DATE_FORMAT( data_date, '%Y-%m' ) ORDER BY data_date ) AS quantity,
	data_date,
	'M' period 
FROM
	dw_ads_prd.dwd_mes_hmes_wms_wh_enter_item 
WHERE
	process_name IS NOT NULL  and en_status='1' and ei_status='1'
GROUP BY
	tenant_id,
	process_name,
	data_date ;

		AND b.scene = 'BI_SC_XL_009_WH'

			(b.ATTRIBUTE1 = '*' OR a.wh_code = b.ATTRIBUTE1)

		AND (b.attribute4 = '*' OR a.sku_code = b.attribute4))

dolphin_task_hits.sql_preview:
DELETE from   dw_ads_prd.BI_SC_XL_009_YIELD_RATE ;
INSERT into   dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_009_yield_rate
SELECT
	a.tenant_id,
	'取向' type,
	round(qx_a_weight/qx_practical_enter* 100, 2 ) a_rate ,
	qx_practical_enter weight,
	sum( CASE WHEN b.attribute1 = '取向' THEN b.attribute3 ELSE 0 END ) plan,
	round( qx_practical_enter / sum( CASE WHEN b.attribute1 = '取向' THEN b.attribute3 ELSE 0 END )* 100, 2 ) qx_rate,
MONTH ,0
FROM
	dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_009 a
	JOIN dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value b ON a.data_date = b.attribute2 
	AND a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id 
	AND b.scene = 'BI_SC_XL_009_PLAN' 
WHERE
	`period` = 'M' 
	AND a.tenant_id = 92 
GROUP BY
	a.tenant_id,
	data_date,
	qx_practical_enter UNION ALL
SELECT
	a.tenant_id,
	'无取向' type,
	round(wqx_a_weight/wqx_practical_enter* 100, 2 ) a_rate ,
	wqx_practical_enter weight,
	sum( CASE WHEN b.attribute1 = '无取向' THEN b.attribute3 ELSE 0 END ) plan,
	round( wqx_practical_enter / sum( CASE WHEN b.attribute1 = '无取向' THEN b.attribute3 ELSE 0 END )* 100, 2 ) rate,
MONTH ,0
FROM
	dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_009 a
	JOIN dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value b ON a.data_date = b.attribute2 
	AND a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id 
	AND b.scene = 'BI_SC_XL_009_PLAN' 
WHERE
	`period` = 'M' 
	AND a.tenant_id = 92 
GROUP BY
	a.tenant_id,
	data_date,
	wqx_practical_enter UNION ALL
SELECT
	a.tenant_id,
	'新能源' type,
	round(xny_a_weight/xny_practical_enter* 100, 2 ) a_rate ,
	xny_practical_enter weight,
	sum( CASE WHEN b.attribute1 = '新能源' THEN b.attribute3 ELSE 0 END ) plan,
	round( xny_practical_enter / sum( CASE WHEN b.attribute1 = '新能源' THEN b.attribute3 ELSE 0 END )* 100, 2 ) rate,
MONTH ,0
FROM
	dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_009 a
	JOIN dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value b ON a.data_date = b.attribute2 
	AND a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id 
	AND b.scene = 'BI_SC_XL_009_PLAN' 
WHERE
	`period` = 'M' 
	AND a.tenant_id = 92 
GROUP BY
	a.tenant_id,
	data_date,
	xny_practical_enter ;
	
	
	
	
	UPDATE dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_009_yield_rate AS target
INNER JOIN (
	SELECT
	tenant_id,
	a.month,
	a.days/b.days*100 actually_rate
	from 
	(SELECT tenant_id,month,max(day(data_date)) days from  dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_009 where period='D' group by tenant_id,month) a 
	join 
	
	(SELECT substr(date_id,1,7) month ,max(day)  days from dw_ads_prd.dim_date_info  group by substr(date_id,1,7) ) b  on a.month=b.month 
 
) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id 
		AND  source.month  = target.month
SET
    target.actually_rate = source.actually_rate ;
